playStoreReviews.text: Great app I love it. It does almost everything I need and what it doesn't the developer has informed me he can tweak. I am using it as a trial between myself and my boss and so far, we think the only change we would make is instead of labour cost an employee start finish would be more beneficial to our operation.

awesome but a bit pricey. also it would be nice if there is a resource sheet creation option so for the next report you dont have to start all over again. it would also make it easy if it was possible to copy an existing report and be able to edit it as new. most daily reports carry information from previous. failed to attach documents if possible give us option to customize headings
This app works great. Way better than hand writing daily reports. The best part is that you can email the reports to many recipients. This definitely improved our payroll process!
It's very easy to use but it would be nice to have the ability to customize. I do think it's crappt to have a free app that all of a sudden you want to charge $10 a month for
Super easy! They have a slew of tradesman and contractor apps if you want to retain the same ecosystem.
Very easy to use. A great tool for the jobsite. I love that you can send the report to anyone instantly without any other steps involved.
Very easy to set up and use. Good daily log , easy picture and document integration.
Makes my job much easier. after driving home after an hour, last thing I want to do is is sit at a computer again. I just speak it in, review what I spoke in and done, send it off
Great experience as a user friendly apps in construction. Very easy to use and all information was there.
Definitely need the ability to edit trades. It's an okay app but needs some improvement.
Cannot open pictures in other folders (sent via WhatsApp for example)...Shame looks good app but cannot use it if cannot upload photos
Pretty good so far. I have only been using it for a couple of days but it allows me to keep my jobs organized.
Great app! Im the test dummy for our company and my PM is liking it. It is easy and simple to use.
so far, so good. I've tried loads of these and it is surprisingly comprehensive. would need a few tweaks in my view but 85% there
Easy to use, excellent record of progress on my projects... saves me time explaining things twice...
Forces you to create an account with email, forces you to email daily logs, forces you to allow GPS use. Incredibly invasive
Really good app, enjoying so far. IT is better than paper work.
Great app for daily logs. User friendly, well worth it.
Paid app. Even for free trial they need bank info.
Excellent App, really handy for recording site activities.
As close to orur organization needs as possible
Detailed, easy to use
Supper good. It makes my work easy
So far so good. Seems to have everything I have been looking for. I will update my review after about a month or so.
very useful app for contractor and sub contractor.
Would benefit greatly from auto-save
Horrible. Don't dare open anything or minimize. You lose all your work.
Most recmnendable app.

so far really like the app

Awesome! EXCEPT it would be nice if it could save dailies periodically throughout the day as you add information, without sending them so you can continue to edit throughout the day and send them at the end of the day when they are complete. (The first daily I created I perform several different tasks that I logged and the app ask me to do this rating and closed that daily. I lost the information and had to recreate.) Also, wish that there was an option of an hourly log in 15 minute increments or so to create a timeline of work performed after tasks are complete.
good options
works great

Wish i could have my guys use a computer and fill out the same type of 
thing. Other then that, i love it.
Buggy.  Could not even add a test project, without being prompted to purchase product.

Simple and easy to use. Good for small operations.
Excellent,  small Corrections would be okay but nothing major it is great
This app crashes. Can't even use it.
Just installed and practicing to improve usage.

It's generally OK, one thing that needs fixed is when you,manually enter the daily temperature it populates all the fields with your first entry instead of letting you show that it was, say 90 during the day and 65 at night.
It would be great app if everything didn't wipe out (the fields ) when you have to change pages for a minute on your mobile. You guys need to fix that. !!!!!!

Free Trial - not free app.  I don't recall seeing anything about a trial period or the fees listed for unlimited reporting when I installed this app months ago.  Talk about a sucker punch.  A one time fee to buy the app is acceptable, but to overcharge monthly or yearly for the ability to email the report is unacceptable. I'll be looking for another app immediately.
Format is good, expandability is also good, simple to use. But I searched free? Free to download, but everything in the app costs.

Absolutely awesome app. Been searching for something like this for months and finally found something that exceeds my expectations, as a Project manager this is fantastic for my supervisors to keep me updated with everything and anything i want to know thanks to the online editing for changing and adding all kinds of other pages and drop downs menus plus loads more you can customise to your hearts content.
Very easy to use
Changes/modifications done in master template doesn't reflect in the user's login.
Very handy for sending professional looking daily reports in pdf forms
Great functionality and support from developers.
I like it
Started out working perfectly. Went down hill fast.. it will not load on my lenovo think pad anymore.

Needs to allow users to delete unneeded reports, but a good app overall.
Need to addressthe issues of not saving info nd freezing after taking a picture
Does not allow me to input my mob and labor hours
Woooow awesome..simply sexy report for professionals.
Best app ve downloaded for my job
Exceptional app for my job as a Site Manager

There are numerous issues with this. I seems like the developers are clueless as to what actually goes into a daily log on a job site. As I stated before it much more easy to just create a spread sheet in Word of Excel. I have spent hours trying to use the program but it is no longer worth my time. The upload your own log feature is a joke, I can just use Adobe reader to edit it and send it in without having to go thru another program. Sorry I tried, removing from all devices.

Time waster!   It discarded 8 photos from today and erased all my form data before I could complete meeting daily report.  Apparently there is no way to collect photos of work progress throughout the day and come back to enter quitting time later.  Grrrrrr!
Sometimes difficult to use, doesn't save report progress automatically
Descriptions, pictures, times, dates. And everything in between. Works flawlessly ( Motorola Droid )

Still no response or assistance from C/s. Sent 3 emails. So created new acct. Keep getting error "member I'd unavailable" no matter what I change. Can't login with user info from another snappi app either says don't match.
Got part way through a test but keyboard blocked access to what I assume was "next"  button. Obviously needs more work.  Thanks for asking me to rate the app.
I just downloaded
Nice app but the writing is so small. Please make it to where we can make the text larger.

This app is not free you have a monthly fee or an annual fee it's not really easy to use never thought I would say this but it's a little too detailed it takes more time than I want to spend on a daily report
that's awesome
Great App
App never worked perfect for me on 4 g or wifi. Only saved some jobs.  App froze several times.  great idea though. Liked the app. Just to many lockups
The clients love the daily updates and having to take pics everyday has really helped me out in building my portfolio of work.  Good job!
Pop up says insufficient memory. How much do I need? Will it work on a Huawei straight off the boat from China?
Every time I open the app it closes by itself , it just a waste of time

I have paid for yearly subscription and still after few days you have locked all the functions. As a result, I can't make any site Reports

playStoreReviews.text: Trying the free version right now and I love it! It helps me keep track of how often I use my items and how many I have. Great way to Catalog. The categories and information you can fill out for each item helps with budgeting and hygiene. I do wish that when I press "used today" it would appear in the calendar section but hopefully that can be added in the future. There is the option for Routines but know what items I used to achieve a look would be great.

I've been evaluating a few beauty inventory applications. This is one of the handful I downloaded to test. So far I like that even in the free version you can customize the types so I can inventory my press on nails and perfume. I also like that I can add a date for when I opened something. I'm still playing around. Curious if there is a way to export my inventory and also note days I used a product for a specific look or video? Still evaluating.

I love this app and it is helping track items in my inventory to keep me to accidentally buying dups. It is also useful to see how many uses I am getting out of products. I just wish there was a way to see the date I started using something. And maybe the dates my uses happened on. I have to document that in a separate place to remember and it would be easier to be able to see that in the app where I am adding that with my usage counts.

I paid the annual fee for the premium version and after almost a week still no upgrade to that version version. They did however take the money out of my account. Tried to email support with no response. Basically they took money from my bank account for premium version with no upgrade to premium version. I know mistakes happen so I hope the app creators reach out to me to fix this

just what i needed. i have ocd & i feel like i HAVE to track information abt all of my products. i did so in my notes app for awhile, but that got very overwhelming & cluttered since i have over 50 items & more my wishlist. this made it much easier & infinitely less overwhelming/messy for me, while giving me features my notes app couldnt. u get so much for only ¢99 a month. my only complaint is that the star rating for products doesn't work & always resets, at least for me.

Just started using to catalog my extensive makeup, skin care, and nail polish collections and so far so good. I suspect the budget feature will be very helpful, as well as the ability to create your own sub-list in each category. To agree with another reviewer, using the calendar to log daily makeup/skincare to spot trends, as well as keeping emptied products available for review, would be fantastic additional functions.

This app offers exactly what I need. I love it! The app is easy to use. The information that it asks you to log are useful. There are few functions I wish the app has: 1. Add a way to mark whether it's full size, travel size, or sample size (and show up when I browse); 2. I wish I could customize my collection browsing screen. For example, I wish it could show how many stars I rated it, instead of having to click on each item to look.3. I wish it give more options to sort.Overall pretty good app

This app is super easy to use , really like that I can add multiple pictures of my products, I can mark uses, track expiration dates and spending. I do wish it was broken down into sections for example under makeup I would like to see tabs for Foundation, blush, bronzer ect or the ability to add these tabs under the main heading of makeup, same for skin care

I downloaded this app to track my expiring foundations so I can use them up before they go off. However, after spending the time to input all the data, I went to the "expiration" area, and knowing full well at least one should be showing since it's expiring this month, I was shocked it didn't pull up any. So, I went back to check the dates and all the expiration dates have been randomized. Most in July 2025, oddly enough, but one even said Dec 31 2030.

I'm really loving this app as a way to check when I need to replenish my products and to remind me when to throw away old products. However, I wish they had a way to let me view my products according to brand or type. I tend to have multiple foundations, eyeshadows, etc so it would be nice to ONLY view those products when I'm trying to design a look or figure out what I'm packing with me for a vacation. Also, I would love if they added a travel option so I can design my travel makeup bag!

This app is my favorite for organizing all of my everything items to be honest, from makeup to skincare to books and photography equipment. However, I bought the premium version on my old phone and it seems not to transfer to my new phone even though that was the whole point, and customer support is unreachable.

Excellent Value and exactly what I needed no more no less. I've found out how much my eyeshadow collection is, track usage and I am using it to track my coloring books, cookbooks, and Art supplies. I can keep track of what I have, track usage and take pictures to go with each item. I paid for unlimited access. 10.99. Worth every penny and more.. (please don't get any idea of raising the price 😬) Thank you for putting in the thought and effort in creating this app.

Great for organization as I have a fairly large collection. It helps to make sure I don't buy too many of the same type of product so I don't end up with 50 primers. I do wish there were a few more features; such as, since there is a calendar, I wish I could input into the calender what makeup I wore for that day so I can easily see trends of my favorite products. Also once a product is finished I'd still like to see any notes I have on the product so I can go back and see how I like the product

I loved this app and used it regularly, even paid for premium. But I factory reset my phone and lost ALL of my data, hours worth of logging and information - gone. The backup system is not reliable and every time I try to restore my data it fails. Extremely disappointing because there aren't any other apps like this on Android that have all these features.

UPDATE 1/2/2020: The developer responded quickly and helped me realize that it was my phone's font settings that was distorting the font size in the app. I updated my rating to 4 stars. If more customization options for the dates in the app are included in a future update, then it'll be a 5-star app. PREVIOUS 12/30/19: This app has been pretty helpful. I discovered I had been using several items that were expired. However, I wish there were more customization options under settings. Users should be able to choose how dates are displayed. There should also be more tabs besides Care and Makeup or users should be able to add their own, such as Nail Polish, rather than putting it under Other. Finally, I noticed that some of the text is cut off at the top when I'm entering a product's name. It's very annoying.

review update the app has been updated recently, and this has improved a lot of things. however there are things that I can't seem to get to work I can't delete anything out of my empties. I can't delete any types or categories

Edit: okay, I have been using this app for like 4 years now, and today it got a massive update. this app is even better than it used to be - I can organize products among different types of project pans I'm doing, see purchasing and usage statistics, keep track of product usage, and make beauty routines. I actually switched my data over to a different google account just so I could pay the dev another 11 dollars for a lifetime subscription because I love this app so much.

The interface looks good and easy to navigate on first use, but there appears to be a bug when adding products to collection. the screen went blank when I tried to add a photo of my product, and I had to restart the app to see and access other features again

UPDATE: They located my data and restored it. Leaving previous review for transparency. Communication about the transition was non-existent, but they were able to fix in 24 hrs. ORIGINAL: Worst app ever. I had my entire collection, over 1000 items input. Uses tracked, prices. Took me MONTHS to input everything. And it was all attached to this email address. I got a new phone and now it's not taking my username and password, and requiring sync to gmail or iphone. Everything is wiped out. TRASH.

So far so good, although I have some issues taking pictures of items, as while the camera opens, it won't save the picture to the item. I can only add photos by taking a picture outside of the app. Also, some of the buttons - notes/pictures/camera are obscured by the picture when it's added - though that's a small niggle. Also I'd suggest adding the ability to add several pictures to one makeup listing - like say if it's a palette of some sort.

Developer had me resolve the issues I had with transferring my data over to my new phone. The latest update has improved things greatly. There are a couple of minor things that need improving but overall 5/5 stars.

I love this app, I just bought the lifetime version. The UI is a bit inflexible though. If you add a note, you cannot erase it. Similarly, if you add a date of usage it cannot be deleted either - even the duplicate item will retain this info! So you have to re-add the item and all just to delete that bit of information. Also, a more useful measurement than grams would be ml imo.

Although the app does the job well and I like the interface (Hence, why I bought their plan in the first place). It is kinda frustrating to use because the app is really buggy and it keeps logging off my account. Please improve this first and I might change my review... Edit: They fixed the bug when it comes to logging in (still a bit buggy tho imo). Nonetheless, this is a good app for keeping track of all my skincare and makeup (w/ price summary for all of my purchases + product expiration)

I really like this app so I upgraded to the pro-version. It is great for keeping track of all my make up. I can list and organise everything by categories and I like the option of having photos of products to remind myself at a glance. I'm very keen on all the different statistics that it shows me including what I own and what I've spent. I would love if this app could include a tracker for product usage too, so I could tally every time I use something to know which products I reach for most.

Great app, easy to use! Happy that I found it. Really helps to organise the products I use and alerts of upcoming expiration dates. And I absolutely love the new barcode scanner feature. Stats, budget planner and beauty calendar are also quite useful. One suggestion though. Would be nice to track not only the starting date but also the date when I finished using a product. Or to have a feature showing how quickly I'm using them. And I hope one day body care and hair products are added too :)

I think this is the best app for makeup organizing on Android, but it needs to improve quite a bit. The app is glitchy - constantly gives an error - especially when you try to log in or create an account. Furthermore, not all brands are available to select- that's still okay, I have to just type it in. However, when you select the color, there aren't a lot of options in that color chart- maybe would be good if that could be updated. My major issue though are the glitches.

Initially, I had paid for premium but the app didn't unlock premium features. The company resolved the issue very quickly as soon as I reached out to them. I like the app a lot, though I have a few suggestions: 1) the ability to change units of measure per product rather than globally 2) better tag handling; tags sometimes appear under the keyboard layer, making it impossible to select 3) the ability to add and additional colour name separate from the colour picker

(4 stars) It's a great app to keep track of what you have, how quickly you're using it and when certain items expire. I just wish there was an option to add multiple images to a single item so I can add a swatch of the product. Edit: (5 stars) I'm astounded that the team considered suggestions that were made to them and implemented it. They truly are the one of the best developers at listening to customers/clients!

I have premium and the app is great. Love the interface, concept and features. Really easy to use and organisation is great except I'm having a slight issue where I add tags to a product but some of them disappear randomly causing some organisation issues with filters. I also wish you could add more lists as its currently care, makeup and other.

Great Idea with great room for improvement, It would be great if the app provides the options of choosing from a data base instead of depending o photos also if it gives me the chance to rate the product, some are excellent I want to remember to buy again and some bad I want to remember to avoid, or remember why they were bad in the first place. This will make the app a 10 Stars for me!
I love this app! It's very easy to organise everything from project panning to your spendings. The bugs have been fixed and the update is really nice because you can track your beauty routines.

Lost all my previous saved products & confusing new layout Updated review: After emailing the developer clarifying on the issues I faced when using the app, they took time to address all the bugs and released the updates. Now, the app is working flawlessly. Thank you.

edit: after contacting the support team, they resolved the issue within minutes. I am excited to try out the app as it looks really promising. I will explore the app fully and write a detailed review but so far this seems to be the best and only app on Android that suits my needs. old review: I have purchased a subscription to try out the app but it still shows that I need to buy a subscription. The money was deducted from my account but I still don't have the subscription. I lost my money.

This app has some great features. I'm glad I paid for premium. I've seen the developer respond to previous feedback and have a few points for consideration. 1. Alphabetical sorting is selectively case sensitive - e.l.f. products appear at the end unless added as E.L.F.; NYX products appear before all other 'N' products unless entered as Nyx 2. Can't seem to move products from collection to wishlist (to repurchase, or if added accidentally in wrong list). Otherwise I'm enjoying using it!

The free version is extremely restricted- don't even bother unless you're willing to buy the regular version. I currently have 8 products that I uploaded last fall and I can't add any more unless I pay for it.

I never rate any apps but I really do love this. The only reason why I didn't give it 5 stars is because of the price to go pro, if it wasn't as much I would definitely buy the pro version. As it does give you a lot of information you need on the products you use. The only thing that I would say that is needed to make it better is to put product sale/offer price as well as the nominal price. Also it would be great if you could put on your wishlist products the price.

UPDATE: The small issue with the premium subscription was resolved in less than 24h hours. Excellent support for a great app. The functions this app offers were exactly what I needed so I got lifetime premium. After a day or two of working fine, it now asks me again to subscribe again and I'm unable to add more products or edit my existing ones.
Easy to use and loving the current features. Would love to see what new developments they make.

I was looking for an app that does pretty much exactly what this one does, I just don't love it because you can only have 3 categories: "Care," "Makeup," & "Other." I would love the ability to expand these categories. As a cosmetics collector, I need more than just 3 categories.

The app features some convenient tools like searching for products, expiration date notification, etc. (although how well those tools work is another matter). However, the app is quite buggy and prepare for a lot of annoying notification about how it stop working right when you want to sync your collection or searching for products. All in all, you'd better not waste your money buying the premium version.

I really want this app to be able to being up all the products from brands, I would type in "anastasia Beverly hills" and all of her products would show up, I click on what I own, it includes the prices, and I can add it to my "profile" so I know how much my collection is worth. I hope this makes sense! It would help a lot with people who want to insure their collection. I hope this helps, I would absolutely love that. There is an app like this for vinyl - discogs.

The app let me input 16 items before telling me I need to pay a subscription fee to add more! This app is a freaking joke!! No one who has only 16 items would need this app! It's made with the purpose of forcing you to pay a monthly fee for basic functions. Just make it a paid app instead of deceiving consumers, it's not useable without the subscription! It's deceiving, a cashgrab and waste of my time.

I paid for the paid subscription but the app won't let me use any of the paid parts, and it keeps asking me to pay again and again although I have, when I click on pay it says "You have already purchased this" but it still won't let me use it - it took my money and won't allow me access to what I paid for it. Either it's a massive scam or there's a serious bug. Edit: the developer told me to contact them and 2 days later I have zero response. It's a scam!!

Had some issues with crashing and not recognizing my premium status but the latest update fixed that. This is great for cataloging and organizing my massive makeup collection. My only complaint is that you can't select a second photo from the gallery, it has to be taken with the camera.

Wonderful app. Helps me organize and keep up with everything so I don't overbuy and so I can use everything I have to make room for more. I wish makeup companies would contribute to the database to speed up the process of getting my collection in, but otherwise the app itself is great and the developers are really responsive! Less than 2 hours to answer my issues when I stumbled into a bug! So great!

So far I really like the app. I am planning on purchasing. It's probably the only app on Android to help track project pans. Sometimes when I try to add dates from when I purchased or started using a product and it won't save, stating that I cannot add a date from the future. A feature I would like to see would be able to add our own photos to the project pan section. Mostly because I found this app after starting my journey and I have a bunch of progress photos on my camera roll already.

I found the app helpful and subscribed, paid for lifetime premium. However, after payment, I still don't have premium feature. I reached out to the app developer, forwarded my Google Play receipt asking for help, but never received a response. UPDATE 2: I finally received a response from the app developer who helped to solve my problem. Appreciate the prompt response. The app is really helpful if you want to organize your beauty products

Fantastic App, Amazing Developer! I send a few feature/improvement requests (along with accolades; the app is already fantastic) and I no sooner blinked than most of them were implemented. So impressed and so very glad I bought a lifetime license. This is gonna save me from having 4 of the same mascara I hated because I forgot I tried it and running out of my favorite moisturizer! ❤️❤️❤️

This app is really kind of pointless. However, there are a few good perks. I really like that you can list everything in your makeup collection and describe what it's used for. You're also able to make a note on HOW to use it and label the item with a picture. That was definitely why I originally downloaded the app. Other than that...it's pointless!

So great app for cataloguing my skincare! Statistics makes it so easy to see how much do I spend for different products, and photos with tags are very convenient to look through my stash. Definitely worth it. I can see you add some features from time to time, please don't stop 😁

Awesome!!! I love the addition of categories as now I can have a place for backup/unopened products without them clogging up my main inventory. So far I only use this app for my skincare, as I haven't gotten around to putting in all my makeup, and am loving it. Thank you to the developer for the quick response.

I really like this app, mostly. I did pay for it and nothing has changed, which seems like a glitch. Also, when adding notes, I don't know where to find them once saved. And it doesn't seem to save tags, which is really disappointing.

i downloaded this app thinking it's free, apparently it's not. I never got the in-app message or intro saying the app wouldn't be free. if it wasn't completely free then the app should have been advertised as such, otherwise it's dishonest and misleading. I might as well keep a GOOGLE doc spreadsheet that does basically the same thing-keeping track of expired makeup.

Awesome App!! This app is so useful!! I ended up enjoying it so much that I purchased the premium forever version. However, I had issues with it and it wiped my database on a few occasions. I ended up need to start from scratch. I LOVE the idea behind this and I think this is awesome app.

Thank you for fixing this issue for me. I really enjoy using the app and appreciate you fixing the problem. Initial Review: Fell in LOVE with this app and bought the forever premium version. A couple days later, the app stopped working for me and kept prompting me to upgrade again. I've reached out to the developer for assistance and nothing. Very disappointing 😞.

I absolutely love this app, and have bought the lifetime usage! I've got all my make up, skin care and nail polish logged and use it morning and night! I love that you can see how many uses you're getting out of a product- it encourages me to actually use my fancier stuff because I can see how many uses I get! Is there an option to see cost per use? Obviously it is basic maths I could do but it might be a function I can't find!

I've been using this app for hours and I am obsessed! You can make your own categories, add your own pictures, it reminds you when your products are going out of date. I just bought the premium which is only like, 5ish dollars a YEAR. Not sponsored, not affiliated, just exactly what I'm looking for. 5 stars!

Finally found an app to input all of my skincare and makeup and to see how much I spent on it! The last update added a field for adding the product size, much appreciated. This update had an issue with taking photos though, but the customer support helped me immediately 😊

there's a lot of potential here. good features, layout, & tracking capabilities. unfortunately, too many bugs & glitches. it makes the analytics and app overall unreliable, which defeats the purpose for me. the app would randomly change dates I assigned to items even after they were saved, wouldn't let me input certain dates or update certain settings at all, it randomly removed ratings from items & removed certain categories altogether at times. the backup feature also didn't work.

Good app, but if you have a make up collection of items over a certain number (I think 30?) then you'll have to pay for premium. Leaving this review because I wish I had of known that before wasting my time.

Got the annual subscription to avoid limitations and because i really think this app has potential to be something great. It has its issues, many features are buggy, not working properly, too complicated to use, some are just all over the place BUT it does the job anyways. It's still in development, but it's a great way for people to organize their cosmetics. If the dev is willing to work on the app, it might just be the next big thing.

mostly great features, but I do not understand the function of the calendar if you can't log what products you used that day. would be 5 stars with that functionality. also, the date format is buggy, but I can work with that.
Not what you think it is. I just want an app to track what makeup I have and I would have to manually enter every detail and pay to add more than a few. Way too time consuming and pointless.

Great app. Would only be improved with a few more categories to subdivide makeup & care into. Love that you can add brands yourself & can do multiple pictures. Does exactly what I need and is perfectly affordable for the premium features.

I liked being able to track the dates and the expenses. It's 3 stars now only because I haven't utilise the other functions yet (calendar and budget). If it could sync between devices, I'd immediately give it 5 stars.
I love the update! Even easier to use & I love the new customizations!
too little free item slots, not really usefull

I love this app to inventory my cosmetic collection, track spending, see purchasing trends, and store wishlist items. I am using Beautistics to be a more mindful consumer and I think the subscription cost is worth the data aggregation.

Great for organising my makeup products. However, would be good if i can input the color type for the product as i have multiple lipsticks from the same brand same product line but in different color.

I have using this app for a couple of months & I love it. I have upgraded to the premium version & have catalogued my huge makeup collection into this app. The main reason I use it is for my Project Pan - it's so quick & easy to see usage. There are a few glitches but I am seeing improvements with every update.

I want to love this app, but I paid for the lifetime upgrade and still can not access the premium features. If this can be fixed, I will definitely change my review as I really like the app so far. *thank you for the quick response and fix!* Definitely worth 5 stars.
Great app. I do wish I could sort alphabetically and by brand. Being able to change the name of the "other" tab would be great too. Otherwise, I'm really enjoying the app!

I love this App! I love to be organized and mix and match and plan out a weeks worth of looks using my collection. The budget feature is pretty cool too. I hope they make another app that does everything this does but with the clothes in my closet. Keep up the good work!
Great tool for organizing, tracking, and using my stash of cosmetics! Highly recommend! Customer service is also incredibly respinsive and are constantly updating with better features.

Waste of time , items imputed disappear, barcode scanner never recognizes top brands and the free version only allows 20 items. 20$ for premium but it does not work. Waste of time and money, do not purchase please!!!

It annoys the HECK out of me that my tags are not being saved when I assign them to products. So whenever I try to look up something based on tags... Nothing. It's been like this for weeks. I was hoping this would have been fixed already.
This is the exact app I've been looking for. It really helps me keep on top of my products and make sure I'm using things before their expiry date, and also tracking what I'm purchasing.
I had very high hopes for this app. Paid for the upgrade to premium, and additional features are still unavailable. Tried to contact dev via email and IG with no response. I'm very disappointed!
Loved it. Bought the premium version and I'm enjoying using it. A suggestion is possibly letting us order the makeup list? E.g. alphabetical order, order by category, customised order etc.
Very helpful app. There was a delay after payment for premium features to work but I contact CS and they got it working immediately, great customer service!
Love this app! Really helpful for makeup inventory, budgeting and tracking. I'm going to track my project pans and my no-buy for next year with this.
This app is useful when it comes to project pan and adding products to see when the expiry date is. It is also helpful to see how much you have spent on beauty products!
This app does great tracking each make up product you have. However It doesn't tell you the expiration date.

This app is a godsend. I use it to track my purchases but also track my entire collection including things I get for free through my profession. 100 stars to customer service for helping me transfer my collection over from my old device to a new one. ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
I like the app, but it seems to have a bug where the expiry date in the edit screen always shows as 1/1/30? Even when elsewhere it shows the expiry date correctly

I was looking for this type of application for a long time. Overall, it's very put together app with nice UI. A couple of suggestions: (1) ability to increase use counter in project pan view, (2) size unit defined per product (liquids are easier to track in ml and solids in grams), (3) ability to filter by tag (in addition to category filter), (4) show expiration date in List view, (5) ability to select time period and top usages by categories in Summary, or have usages section in Statistics
I like the app but some of the dates of purchase and expiration dates you set won't save properly!

As a Blind makeup hobbyist, this incredibly useful tool has totally relieved my organisational woes! Easy to navigate, efficacious functionality, TalkBack accessible. The $5.99/yearly Pro version is SO worth it!

This app is too time consuming. There should be an easier way to add products, such as being able to scan the bar code and it automatically loads the product information to include brand, product name, and price.
Love this app. Helps me keep track of all my beauty/makeup items and when they expire. Thanks Beautistics!
I absolutely love this app! Keeps me organized and preventing me from over consumption of products.
I have been looking for an app like this for 5 years. Its everything I want for managing my makeup amd skincare collection.
This is EXACTLY what I was looking for! I have way too much makeup and wanted a way to organize/inventory it. I like it so much I purchased the upgrade. Thanks so much for making this!
used it to keep track. Since update keeps saying loading all I have on it has gone
I love this app! I've been using it for almost 2 years now. My only complaint is I can't use it on my chrombook or computer.
This app is helping me to keep track of my products and when they expire. I'm trying out the project pan functions next.
Bar code is not working for all products. I suggest uou may integrate google lens to add product. I reside in india so most brands are also not there even big brands like MAC and smashbox
Doesn't transfer saved information to other devices. I have asked for help. Still won't work.
It only allows you to add a couple products before you then have to pay to add more
I think it could be alot better. I'm getting used to it tho. But it is kind of a pain in the butt. It's a great concept, great idea. Keep at it.
Fun

Even after contacting Sortly to try and resolve some issues privately, they were unable to work with us so I'm sharing those same thoughts publicly. I cannot recommend this product- it is clunky, does integrate with other ubiquitous products like Shopify, and is a glorified spread sheet. We used this product for home staging so there are a lot of ins and outs all the time- this app can't keep up. It's expensive and absolutely not worth the resource investment.

Update 1/9/26: I found another app for guns and ammo but still use this for tools. Again, it says I have maxed out entries but only have 95 (not 100). Cheated out of 5. 4/1/25: This app was great, until it wasn't. I have inventoried all of my guns and was part way through my tools when I got a warning that I have reached 100 entries and would have to upgrade. The cheapest upgrade is $24/month. Not cheap for a homeowner that just wants to have record of things. Now I have to find something else.

I purchased this app as a home user for my extensive collections and belongings, such as books, toys, barbies, liquor, glass, china, etc... This app is very easy to use. As of Jan 2019, pictures still disappear and you cannot enter a book by scan or isbn (and yes, we know pro does, but I dont have a business). As an individual wanting to be more organized, I would give this app 4 stars if the pics didn't constantly disappear and it would be 5 stars if books could be entered by ISBN or scan.

I started with app in 2018. I was very happy with this product all these years. Then they sent me a email that my cost was going up 357%! Almost $1,100 more per year! When I reached out to customer service, I received a generic response and no consideration for being a long-standing customer. I had to downgrade my services, and I'm still paying more. I understand that costs have gone up, but this price increase is ridiculous. I'll be looking into alternatives.

Really loved the app i have tried for a really long time and i mean by long over a year to find an app and sortly was finally the answer there's a couple thing that bugged me. First of all there is no tutorial so there is no way of knowing what you're doing unless you do some tests yourself and even if you find a "better way" sometimes you can't repair the way you want unless you delete and start over. And the issue I'm suffering the most is that I can't adjust the items order in the list.

Meh. Sortly Plus is better than most (and there aint too many options out there that actually works or is easy to work with or has flexibility in recording/sorting any information desired (Sortly fails on this point)). One thing to keep in mind, this is just an inventory app and as such excells, but as a collection database record, it sucks. go look elsewhere. I like that its cross-platform compatible (even tho the PC is only via web browser and doesnt have a dedicated app). HOWEVER, I collect guitars and Sortly Plus cannot record anything more than the most basic info (a name and a serial number, is pretty much it, aside from ONE pic/record).  Cannot record any other info such as where/whom/when I bought it from, amount paid, color, setup info, any notes (<- note plural, i usually have more than one notes related to each item), web links to any resources/info,  cannot attach files, etc.  Methinks I may cancel subscription before trial ends...  I know that Sortly Pro supposedly does that BUT at $25US/month, that is WAY too much out of pocket for a private individual to justify.   I dont mind paying for functionality, but not that much.

For the first 4 days this app worked very well. I subscribed to the paid version and had family members help me input all the items in the container and shed. Tgen 2 days later while trying to adjust inventory up and down we noticed that items were being dropped from the or lending information was not being recorded. Then to top it off we now realize that the app has stopped syncing between devices. I tried the online help, and then reached out to the app creators....still no help provided.

Enjoyed using app past few months. Started with free version. It is easy to understand and use. When I got serious about creating folders and photographing items I immediately realized I wanted more options and was willing to pay for them. Unfortunately Sortly has decided to go with big business at $50+/mo minimum. I am an at home cookier. This is out of my price range. Glad I found this out now b4 maxing out my allotted 100 entries. For this reason I rate it a 3 bc my business doesn't matter.

I LOVE THIS APP. I used it to categorize and keep track of individual boxes when I was moving to a new house. I'll use it again and again every time I move. You can take pictures of the inside of each box AND put tags in each one. So I can literally type in "DVDs" and it will tell me exactly which boxes (I made labels and codes out of colored tape) have the DVDs in them, or the crock pot, or whatever. It's so amazing!!

I absolutely love this app! I don't own a business, however I do have an extensive collections of hobby items, such as cookie cutters, cake pans, chocolate molds, pantographs for quilting, etc, and this app makes my collections much more organized & accessible. I know where each item is stored & what it looks like. I love that I can have up to 8 pictures per item, that I can search all folders by item name or by tag, such as "Thanksgiving". It makes planning for holidays so much easier! Love it

Wishful thinking. I've been watching reviews of this app on YouTube and was really exited to use for organizing my crafts. In the middle of adding folders and getting excited about it, I decided to read more recent reviews. Seems like the home version (all the reviews I had watched) is no longer avl and the app has moved to a consumer version at much higher prices. Even with the current discount $25 a month, its just too much for me. Guess going back to excel or paper. Really too bad.

I've been using this app for my balloon business for the past 7 months and I love it. I've not had any issues outside of loading time after major data input. It saves me a ton of time and labor on weekly & monthly ordering. The beat part for me is I don't have to be at my shop to see if I have an item in stock. It does take time to setup & get all of your items input but once that's done it's a breeze to update your inventory.

Great concept, but flawed program. I use this for my company (we pay monthly) and at first it was great but now, after using this for more than 8 months, I am always having to login / out (even deleting/reinstalling) which prompts it to begin syncing (can take up to an hour). Many of our employees have similar issues. Items will either be missing or not sync properly and can be very frustrating... Like I said, the thought behind the program is great, but definitely needs a lot of bugs fixed.

This was a fantastic app for packing up for my last move--nothing else comes close. After days of searching I can't find anything that even begins to do what I want. Unfortunately, they've now switched entirely to focusing on business use, and the prices are too high for anything else. I would happily pay $39.99 once to own this app (and that's a huge price for an app), but that rate per month is simply not workable for home use. This is a very disappointing decision.

Sortly is the perfect solution for me. I'm using the subscription (~$5) version of the app to organize a major move. I have temporary accommodation for the next 5 months before moving to another continent, I have things in storage, things for sale, things ready to be shipped - a lot to keep track of. With Sortly I know exactly what is in each box, and what I intend to do with each item. Couldn't be happier.

I'm sorry, but paying $5 a month just to have an inventory of items I own is freaking ridiculous. I was hoping to have am app I could keep track of items that arent books or movies so I know what I have before buying. It works well for free, but I have more than 100 items to sort in my life and the fact o have to manually input each one because the scanner is only available for the paid version makes me never want to use it. If it was one, SINGLE payment. Sure. Not yearly/monthly, though.

I got the free version to try initially & loved it...easy to use, nice look, & allowed me to organize things well. After about a month photos & icons started disappearing. It wasn't because the photos synced to the cloud & were no longer on my device -when I moved them back they still wouldn't reset. I reached out to Sortly support, but they weren't helpful. The only way to get photos back seems to be to retake them. No thanks...I wouldn't pay for this. Without photos I have no use for this app.

i am a collector and wanted to be able to sort my collection, however I have more than 100 items, and the upgrade price is HUGE! $40-$100 a MONTH! It sucks because the platform and app was perfect for what I needed it for, and now I can't use it and I wasted all that time entering for nothing. I see that they are trying to move on from personal inventory to being a business platform, but it sucks that they are ignoring the needs of their original consumers by getting rid of the home option.

I trained our student government to use this app in the school store and while we haven't implemented it fully yet, it has been useful so far to keep track of inventory. Unfortunately, because they don't have a cheaper options to use, the scanner will have to find some other way to use it. Besides the most convenient way. It'd be great if they had some sort of sortly for education option as I think schools and students might use this app if it was more affordable

Love the app. I'm not a business but I'm a collector. I would have preferred if I will be able to do a 1 time purchase for additional entries past the free 100. I only need about a 1000 entries at the moment but the monthly subscription plan is too steep for me and 2000 entries is overkill for my kind of usage.

I’ve been using this app for 2 years. I like the app but they raised the price from $468 a year to $1428! That’s an increase of $960! Unfortunately I can’t afford the new price and have to cancel my subscription. I understand everything is going up but this is ridiculous and greedy. 2 years of entering data, pictures, quanities, etc - GONE. I contacted them to see if they could do better, and was told NO! STAY AWAY!! BoxHero is just as good at a fraction of the price.

Really happy with app but disappointed with pricing. The interface is great but $40 a month as your next price point from the free trial version is going to exclude a lot of customers who'd pay maybe $5 a month just to have more entries available. Was excited to use this but going to have to switch to a different app given the pricing.

I've only been using the app for a few days, but would like to see a dedicated way to inventory. Would also like to see the ability to add more information on labels and the ability to have that information on smaller labels. More granular reporting would be nice as well. The ability to print labels out of the app/website, and a dark mode.

This is by far the best Inventory Management Software that I've used. Not only is it simple but it's also powerfully customizable to set options just the way you desire. This companies clarity, transparency, and communicatiom is top tier professional. I can see Sortly overtaking other tech giant organizations in the future if they continue on the pathway they're going. So in conclusion, I love the software, I love how helpful their team is, maybe one day I'll join their team. 👀 10/10 🌟!

Advertised as a free application for inventory, I downloaded it to my tablet and after installing it and creating an account a limit of items per non-paid account. I also downloaded it into my tablet as I would want to use it there more and when running it the application clearly looks like a phone app running on a tablet. The text and buttons don't show correctly in some cases part of the screen are hidden with no scrollbar. May be great but this wan't a good first impression

When accessing an already established database with thousands of pictures it wants to download and sync those thousands of photos, rather than downloading them as I try to access that item. This seems entirely backwards. The rest of the app seems to function as expected, but I'll be deleting it and sticking to the desktop version until that issue can be addressed.

Easy to use, app and desk. I do use the app, but the barcode scanner doesn't work. Using note 10, everything up to date, including app. Helpdesk asked if it was all up to date, replied with yes and specs. Never received another reply, even reached back out and nothing back. I like all that it offers, I will continue using. My rating is based on lack of help of their software, and the main reason for users of this app is the scanner and it's not working.

Great app! I wish they had a membership tier aimed at individuals (vs. at businesses) that would give you 200-300 items for $10 per month. I can't justify $30-50/month for what's essentially a home inventory app for me, so I just prioritize the 100 items that I list in the free version.

I love Sortly and use it daily in my work, but the app isn't fully supported in Android 13 and I'm not able to add photos from my library as a result. I also wish that photos could be cropped within the phone app like they can the iPad and desktop client. I hope this is all fixed soon, because it's otherwise great

Need a way to communicate trouble ticket details to development. Found several issues. We think the system is easy to use and the label system saves time. We did run across some development issues but there's does not seem to be any phone support to troubleshoot or advise of issues within the program. Great start to an easy to use system. Needs a little tweaking.

App is fantastic. Business Model is horrendous. In my months of using Sortly Plus (now called Sortly Plus Legacy) the software is great. UX could be better, but it's a pleasure to use. I paid $5/mo. for my 1st year of Plus. This price has since been raised. The same plan is now $40/mo (80% increase). I back up my data via csv. If my legacy plan expires they will lose my business. Software good. Sub. Plans are awful. Any paying customers should have unlimited items. Storage is cheap. No excuse.

I signed up to try this app/service to track a personal collection. Internet searches seemed to recommend it. Although they have pages on their site that indicate the service has version for home inventory, collection tracking, and even tracking items for a move, in reality they are only after business use cases. The app and service appear like they could handle these use cases quite well. Sadly, they are not interested in the business of an individual.

Update 6/11/21: contacted Sortly support as indicated by developer comment to find bulk editing feature. I was told that it is not offered in the mobile app and must be done through the desktop version. Bulk Editing in the mobile app would make the app so much more useful. Add Bulk Edit!!! You can bulk edit items in specific folders from the website but not from the mobile application. This would make it so much simpler to use at different points in the supply chain.

this app asked if you are using it for personal reasons or if you are a business then proceed to treat you like you are a business the whole time. The prices are crazy also. 24.99/ month to keep a list of my personal belongings and be limited to 500 items is crazy work. One of my collections is larger than that.

I actually really like the app. it had all the features I was looking for. the only issue i had is simply with the pricing. I would gladly pay $50 for this app which is alot but worth it. unfortunately the subscription model just makes the app not worth getting.

So many developers seem to think that it's ok to deliberately mislead there potential customers, this isn't a free app it's $4 a month, My complaint isn't about the cost which maybe a reasonable amount, it isn't about the functionality of the app which again maybe very good, my complaint is about the underhand way they trick you into downloading and using this app before telling you the price. Im sure I would have found it useful , but I will never know as I refuse to be manipulated.

It all looked very nice at first glance, but there are some errors that make working impossible, I have 3 users and right now for an item I'm checking not a single device contains the same information in one of them there is even more inventory, somehow moving an item from one folder to another increased the total amount but only in one device, all devices have been synced but the problem persists, it totally sucks and would mess up all your inventories so bad

LOVE this app, started with it in iOS and so happy it is now here in Android! Bought a lifetime subscription. If you have things in storage or between multiple houses, DOWNLOAD THIS! I have been able to earmark things for decluttering in Scotland from a beach in Queensland (I didn't have time to make decisions like that when I needed to pack up, but now everything to go out is tagged and it will be quick and easy when I get back). It also saved me bringing shampoo and conditioner on the plane because I could check that there was some waiting for me on the other side. These sound like small things but they have been such a blessing and have saved me money simply by virtue of being more organised! Also haven't used the QR code labels in a while but they have helped my family determine which boxes are fragile when they have had to move them for me in my absence. A very handy little app. I will be trying out using it for suitcase planning in future (e.g. tagging my clothes by weather/occasion so I can see a list of viable options based on the forecast/activities packing). Recommend!

It's an ok app. It had bugs which were annoying, although maybe fixed with updates. Backing up and sharing is quite limited, however, making it difficult to transfer a list of you step using the app or change phones. You are then stuck with the app and ongoing monthly cost, the value of which I cannot see. Why a monthly subscription? Most apps have a small yearly fee or slightly more for full, lifetime access.

Works well but expensive. I needed something with a barcode scanner to catalogue my sewing patterns, sheet music and books at home so I don't re-buy things. It was really easy to use and Ifigured I'd upgrade when I hit the hundred item limit only to discover that the plans are super expensive. This is not an effective choice for home users, only businesses. I recomend the developers look at making a single user subscription for others like myself who just want to keep track of things at home.

It's a pretty nice app, it even has an option for tracking personal items, which is what I want. I went and started setting it up and then find out that only the first months free and then they start charging you. Nothing ever mentioned on here about that. Its super frustrating to spend time setting stuff up and then you have to either pay or just say oh well. It was for personal use there ain't no way I'm paying $25 a month to keep track of what clothes I have !

The app (free version) works great particularly in our case where we have a very limited amount of entries since the raw materials are the same and the end product (only one) is same as well. But we do need this to manage the inventory levels on the go. One problem that kindof defeats the whole point of sortly of being simple and robust is that I cannot give a universal minimum stock quantinty. Meaning I can only manage low stocks in individual locations and not as a whole. Pls fix it.
Waste of my time. It says it's a free app but you can only enter 100 items before they want to start charging you for further inventory entries.

Alot of options and informations are hidden behind a paywall for free users. Good for small business with 50 or lesser items and this is accounting for variants of the same product which will add up. Use Excel sheet if you are unsure. App is great though. All basic information are displayed at one glance.

I'm a sole trader selling a few knives and such. This is the third inventory app I've tried. Although I'm only using the limited free version I have to say it does everything very well with no glitches or hiccups and is easy to use, especially for a novice computer user like me. Thank you Sortly!

This is an awesome app to help organize & sort my stamps, inks, dies & supplies. I'd give it a 5 star if only within the app can the photos be edited. I tried taking the pics with the camera & editing there & adding it to the file. I didn't want to have all my craft supply pics on my phone. So, I deleted them from my phone's album & storage. Only to find my pics were also deleted from the file I created in the app. Using the camera within the app, the pics are not centered & no editing option.

crazy expensive for a personal tracker. and talk about a rip off. even if you pay for it it's next to useless as a professional tool if you run a real company. they even limit the top plan on entries. lots of better apps for lower and free cost out there. nothing like charging customers a monthly fee and offering zero services to explain these cost. this is a one time payment style app that someone just got greedy with.

Update: Support was very responsive and I am now able to sync on my mibile device. I also am able to download reports on my laptop where I can easily edit them to fit my needs. I like the ease of use and that I can create tags and add written descriptions. I am using it to catalog my jewelry for insurance. I subtracted a star because the sync won't work and so I can not download the inventory to print or email to my insurance company.

Bought in and decided it wasn't for me right now. Great app but the only negative is that I'm still paying and I can't even use it unless I subscribe again... then I'll pay double? I tried clicking on the notification that read "You will continue to receive charges on your account until you can" yep, that's all it said and I clicked to find out more... took me right back to download the app and pay. Guess I'll just have to close my business account.

Web app is super slow, it takes minutes to check one item in the item flow section, UX is not the best, it could be way simpler to see a graph and get relevant information about my stock. Seriously, is this what we are paying for ? Updates upon feedbacks from customers takes ages. Seems like an abandonned app to be frank.

Can't even open an account. When I enter my business name a drop down appears asking for my industry. app won't let me select anything and won't continue. I wasted a lot of time trying to troubleshoot this. Very annoying/buggy and certainly not living up the "simplified" part.

Might have been good at one point but the price point now is $50 a month just for a family move if you want moving labels. I wish the had a non-business more affordable option. It's crazy they make you spend $100 after you've done all the inventory work to put the labels on the boxes for a 2 month move....

Was unable to setup automatic backup/sync through google drive integration. Also found no manual export/import functionality for backups There was however syncing on by default (to unspecified location, likely their own servers), so if you don't feel any issue with relying on a single party for this, and the inability to setup redundancy (which I do), the app is likely enough for your usecase.

Not bothered by the cost for the app. The app needs some work. The camera feature is awful!!!! Needs work. No editing options and it often turns photos upside down. Adding multiple items at one time needs to be added. I think adding an option for one to designate their own Fields.

I like it a lot except very few of the clothing UPCs pull up information when you scan them. I'm not sure if it's the fault of the app or of the clothing manufacturers though, as there are a couple that have worked. I wish there was an option to enter the UPC manually to pull up the information. (Or is there and I just missed it?)

Sortly has revolutionized the way I handle my hoarding disorder :) --- I am now able to store things in such a way that their utility is restored by virtue of being able to find then again! Wishlist to reach 6stars: > Improved search intelligence --- often I am unable to find things as search function returns only exact matches. E.g. "Black plastic drop sheet" will not find an item named "Drop sheet plastic black". > Photos --- Remove cropping of displayed images. I.E. Show the entire image.

Love the app, everything I was looking for. I wanted to continue after I used all 100 entries, but I saw the cost, and it was way out there. I would happily pay a small fee per month or annually, but not at $40 a month just so I can keep track of my collection. It's time to look elsewhere, I guess.

I downloaded this app and have just started using it to populate the database. The barcode scanner, however, does not seem to recognize mainstream products for markets outside the United States. It does not recognize items I have purchased in Europe, Africa, and the Middle East. Is there another way to scan in those items without having to do so manually? Thanks!

Love it! It was exactly what I was looking for. A phone app with pictures of the inventoried item that reads bar codes and then pops up the item to change qty or edit..whatever. Could not be easier to use.

Holy expensive! Just wanted for home use, but with what they are charging I'll just throw my stuff away and buy new everytime I need something. I mean they are talking crazy prices for the non free version and the free version is too limited to be of use to anyone. Uninstall...

In theory the app is great. But I paid $60 for a year subscription, spent a weekend taking pictures, uploading and organizing everything, and now when I click on items in the app the pictures are gone and they don't show up.

The app works great for small business like ours(appliance repair) Parts, change inventory location so oft en(received, installed, cores, returns etc)Sortly makes quick easy work of classifying these parts and you can use the lent(as in something loaned out) feature to get a reminder on parts whose "return by date" for either (core , damaged or overstock ) so that you dont lose money due to expired windows of return , love that you can scan item in with phone and then assign folder/location ....

I do not want to switch to an iPhone just because of one app if it is not necessary.

Using to inventory waste treatment plant machines. I am able to take multiple photos, enter a serial number using the free custom field and then export all the data so that my pictures are neatly organized in an Excel sheet. This saved me a ton of time as pairing photos of machines that all look simular to their actual names, locations and serial numbers would have been a nightmare.

We were looking for a way to consolidate our inventory and improve consistency, reliability, portability, efficiency, etc. Sortly has allowed us to accomplish these goals! We are very pleased :)  Easy to use. I like being able to add pictures of items. Tags are powerful because items can be in multiple overlapping groups if needed. I used the .csv import feature and it worked great after I got all the data correct in the spreadsheet; spreadsheets are very logical and unforgiving so make sure your data is in order. I asked sortly a few questions and they scheduled a web meeting to meet with me and my boss; they were helpful and very professional.  Thanks Sortly!  Danny Woodring  Sonocare, LLC

2 years ago had the unfortunate event of a house fire. Sortly was labeled a better bet to inventory the items lost in the fire. I have been working in bars nightclubs and strip clubs for almost 25 years and in doing inventory in every possible way from corporate bars to hole in the wall bars it is typically one of the most aggravating experiences of any and all my jobs. The current company I work for has been doing it on paper and then manually entering it into a spreadsheet for over 10 years. Since switching to partender, it has become far less time-consuming and a far more accurate.

I really appreciate the usability of Partender. It saves us so much time on inventory each month. (adjusting the levels of bottles is also just kind of fun!) Adding new products is easy & I love that you're able to add your own photos of products. I think any bar or restaurant would benefit from utilizing Partender! Simplifies everything. - Liz, Copper Whiskey Bar

I couldn't believe how fast and easy this is and how much it gives us in terms of insights. I'm having all my bartenders inventory their own stations each day ans they are getting more organized. I realized much time we were losing when serving guests bc we didn't have consistency for foh or boh. Now we have both. I should add we were lucky enough to go through the VIP training and I highly recommend it. Since inventory is your biggest driver of sales this helps us make more

I am a Manager at the Celtic Cowboy. I had an issue that I reported to partender through their help services. I immediately got contacted, and then received a phone call from one of their service agents, Erwin. He helped me sign up for their training program. It has so greatly benefited me and my business. Not only reduced time in inventory, but also in helping with analytics and pinpointing product loss. 10 out of 10 recommended the app and the training program to anyone with a bar!

Partender has been a great addition for us. It makes inventory a breeze and allows us to track our costs accurately. We have also been able to greatly reduce what we have on hand with the reporting it offers. We are able to directly place orders to our distributors through the app which also saves a ton of time. Customer service has been great. Any questions we have had were answered promptly and follow up calls were made to ensure that were still on the right path.

For someone like me who isn't very tech savvy, setting up my bar on Partender was so easy! I was hesitant to transition to something new after decades of paper/pen/Excel. But realizing how much dead stock we were stuck w/ during Covid closures made us realize how much we were overordering! Partender not only saved us time spent during inventory, it also increased our bottomline by 8% within a few months! The customer service rep, Alexa, was so friendly & truly excited about helping us succeed!

Massive timesaver, more time w guests. Very easy to use. Smooth, can track your inventory + locations. Shows you exactly where items are. so organized & accurate. I love the images and how you can use the label to be exact. Also anyone can learn about our bar program while doing inventory. At Valley-low club in Glenview, inventory took so long and was on pen paper. so much time saving. important for a GM running F&B in a busy club. And the best onboarding. they help general tech support 2😅

This app has been helping me save so much time! I've been training in my position to do beverage inventory, and a few weeks ago we switched to Partender. The change has made things so much easier and quicker. The parts of inventory I was previously struggling with are a breeze now.

Partender has made inventory counts so much easier than old school eyeballing measurements. Takes the guesswork out and minimizes mistakes made. Working at multiple different venues and using different methods over the years, this program makes it so much easier. My team doesn't grumble at the dreaded 'inventory day'. It's cut the time it takes to complete by hours! As an FEC it's important to get things done swiftly and with accuracy and Partender does that!

My inventory was easy after I got it. Ordering was easier, taking inventory was way quicker. I could tell who was over pouring from home, with the info from my POS. I have told other businesses about you and have had nothing but great help with customer service. I would definitely recommend this service.

shakia B. D&B baltimore. Partender is an amazing service and app. In the past, I've normally done inventory by hand, and now using this app has shortened the time needed to do inventory in half. functionally, it's easy to navigate and has been such a great help. if you have a full service bar with a lot of inventory, this would be great tool to have. Amber was great.

Duane Jackson Sr 3 5 7 Club Before Partender, our weekly liquor orders ran $1,800-$2,200 and I couldn't tell you exactly why. Now we're consistently under $800, with some weeks as low as $500. Our on-hand wholesale value dropped from $13,000 to $8,700 while the bar stayed fully stocked. What changed: we could finally see what was actually happening. Overpouring, missed sales, wrong POS entries, product going out untracked. Partender put numbers to all of it, which made it a lot easier

Dont do it! Neat app, terrible company. Notified them of the sale of our business via email a year ago and they just charged me the auto renew and wont refund.
