Partender has been a lifesaver and the training is top-notch! As a first time bar owner, I have learned so much about how important accurate inventory and reporting means to ensuring our business remains successful and profitable. Partender is user friendly and the app makes doing inventory take a fraction of the time. Highly recommend!!!

Partender has been such a helping hand for us when we're completing inventory here at work. It's a relief to switch over from a messy folder of spreadsheet files to a streamlined, well-designed app! It has helped me free up time to focus on other tasks that need to be completed here at the bar.

I've work at T's Bar, and we have used Partender in the past to help manage our inventory to a new level. I love the amount of time it saves us, and the accuracy it has. Our ROI has increased tremendously since using Partender. It has helped our entire team not worry so much about inventory accountability now. Thank you Partender -Tristen, T's Bar

Such a shame that the system still does not allow products to be measured by weight or bag or box, etc. Otherwise it would be a good app. Update after reply: Users have been asking for this feature for years. We've been equating 1kg = 1 bottle. As someone who has been involved in system development for many years, I can't believe that there would be a huge amount of work to achieve it. Despite reassurances, I don't really expect that the feature will ever be added.

I have utilized the Partender app with a number of different concepts in the past. I would recommend to specific concepts to maximize time with counting inventory. Partender also seems to be integrating their resources more now than I've previously experienced.

This app has been very useful and accurate with my store. Makes ordering and inventory very easy, less stressful, and most importantly organized where I can keep tract of all my inventory. Not only that but Sam was very helpful and explaining into detail about the application ad well as the website. Love this application.

Never done bar inventory before but it's so easy with Partender. I loved learning about it! They couldn’t have a better spokesperson. This kept my attention! Can’t wait to use it regularly! Christianver did inventory before but this is so easy Did food inventory before. Never done beverage. I loved learning about it! They couldn’t have a better spokesperson. This kept my attention! Can’t wait to use it regularly! Christian from the Chase Sapphire Lounge

"With decades of management experience, I've done inventory the old way-paper, pen, spreadsheets-and it took 5+ hours. Now with Partender, I'm done in 2 hours, and I know it'll get even faster as I organize more. The slider and bottle visuals are game-changing, the web portal makes tracking orders and updating data effortless, and the Beverage Cost Calculator saves me from doing manual math. It's efficient, accurate, and exactly what I need to run operations smoothly. - Antonio, Director of Op.

This App has saved us countless hours on counting and tracking inventory, and is so user friendly it makes using and teaching it so easy! The Team running it are very helpful when any issues arise, amd get to resolving it very quickly. Honestly this app is a must have when running a bar or restaurant!

Been in the industry 30 yrs, including 12 Hotel & D Concourse at ATL, doing it all from bartending to inventory. Used to the old school inventory until we got Partender at AMEX (I know they used it at STK too). I just learned how to use it in 90 SECONDS. Anyone can do it. So simple/quick. Love the organization. The app gets your team able to find bottles and serve guests, especially with efficiency & speed. Makes inventory and training a breeze, plus we're ordering smarter now. Game changer 💥

I'm a bartender at Amex Centurion Lounge and this app has been a life saver. We can see exactly what was poured out so we don't run out of stock or over order. And it's keeping us organized and I can always find bottles now. Must have for bartenders who want to best serve their guests and make more tips

Been in the bar and restaurant industry for about 26 years and have done or helped with inventory at several different places. In the past it's mostly been the "call and respond" system where one person holds the inventory sheet and calls a product and the other person tracks it down and counts full items and uses the 10 point system for opened items. Anyone who has done this understands how tedious and time consuming it can be. Partender has made our lives so much easier. Patrick, coclubs

Overall its an extremely impressive app. Has helped my business's bottom line from a loss standpoint and separates theft from actual spillage due to the accuracy and ordering for inventory ease. Would highly recommend any F&B company implement Patender into their policies and procedures. 10/10

We have had an excellent experience working with Partender. We use Partender to efficiently and effectively count our entire beverage inventory. The app is extremely easy to use, easy to personalize, and they are very responsive if we have any questions. We save hours every week counting inventory so we can focus on the bigger picture of our program and better guest experience. What used to be 10+ hours are now much shorter and I know my team is extremely happy to have this time back.

It's got a killer feature; the graphical method of measuring bottle contents. The rest of it is very average, sometimes incompetent. And the team responds to suggestions as if they are already working on it but actually they did nothing new for 2 years.

We work with Partender at the Amex lounge in ATL and they are a lifesaver. The support is incredible and we actually do inventory daily so we know exactly how much we go through daily-we can do the whole lounge in literally 15 minutes with our bar team. It's also nice having one place to send and track all our orders.and anyone can do inventory on Partender since it's image based. Ive never worked in food & beverage! Partender is a no-brainer

I used to work for united lounge (IAH) and now I work for centurion lounge (LAX) and the Partender is a great app to keep up with inventory and get rid of dead stock.. made it super easy to reorder liquors because it stores every inventory list and order in addition to 15 min turn-around time to send information to vendors ....Major reduction in paper usage and brain power to calculate tenths of every liquors!! Highly recommend ^Paisley

The app is amazing I love all the features on how to do inventory. I wish I had used this app in my previous bartending jobs it would have saved me a lot of Time. This will make our jobs more easy and accurate. Thank you Anjali for training us. My name is Miguel I've worked at the Virgin Atlantic lounge and now currently working at the Centurion lounge at LAX.

I actually served the founder and the team that put the app together. Talking to them is an eye opener they really take consideration in the work that is put as a bartender/bar manager. The app shaves so much time in the process and I have to say I appreciate them for that I get to go home early to my dog. Lol so thank you for that.

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ I had an excellent experience with professional training from Erwin at Partender. Erwin is extremely knowledgeable, patient, and thorough. He explains concepts clearly and makes sure everything is understood, not just learned mechanically. The training was practical, efficient, and immediately applicable. I highly recommend Erwin and Partender to anyone looking for top-level professional training and support in successfully managing the bar business.

0 STARS.....Super bad first impression. Download the app. Enrolled and it takes 15 minutes to load or set up inventory sections. After those 15 minutes I get a sales call from them. I requested to do the demo online or by video and the sales rep HUNG UP THE PHONE. Disappointing as a new business owner.

Learn from ad is not exactly what l got through trial testing. No email support contact or any kind. No report after input my testing inventory... What a shame it seems like a good app,. Seems like waste of time.

I've worked in fine dining at Le Papillon in San Jose, California. The app is user-friendly and intuitive, making it easy to use even for those who aren't tech-savvy. The app has a wide range of features that allow you to track your inventory levels in real time and I love that future teams at our chain will have historical data. This such a great marketing and usage tool. It helps empowers us to give teams comps & while them accountable accountable.

I am owner of Fireplace Bar in St. Louis, Missouri. We've been using partender for a couple months now and I wished I would have known of it sooner. Before this, I didn't feel confident in our numbers or costs, our total beverage cost dropped from 36% to 19% and we've kept it consistent. Reporting makes it easy to see where we have loss. A theft issue was caught just by tracking our numbers week to week. As an owner, I recommend this to anyone needing less stress while managing inventory.

playStoreReviews.text: I absolutely love this app! I use it literally every time I have to tip!  I love that it lets you put in the bill total and lets you choose any of the following: -percentage -dollar amount -what you want to grand total to be  And it auto-adjusts the other fields to what they'd be. Or if I want the tip or grand total to be a round, whole-dollar amount, it shows me what that would be in percentage.  I haven't used the split feature yet, but I think that is very clever.

Just had to uninstall it when I learned there was better. The ads, I get it. Everyone deserves to get paid. But the full page ad and the additional load time it puts on the app is killer. I finished getting my nails done and I'm standing at the register and I have to do the tip calculation QUICK and I have to let the app load, connect to whatever it does to load the app, find the X on the full page app, sometimes the ad crashes so the whole app crashes, and it's already felt like a lifetime.

Used the app for years and loved it. Was quick and easy to use. Did exactly what you wanted and nothing else. Now, there are ads all over the place. They say you can unlock the pro version for free (to remove ads) by downloading their other app. Did it. Nothing happened. Looked at the comments and others had the same issue. The dev company doesn't bother to respond, which says a lot. Uninstalled both apps. Don't waste your time on this app or company, they're just not worth it.

Love this app, used it for years, and loved the integration with expenceiq. Doesnt crash when clicking EXPENSEIQ anymore....but tells you need to download and install...but it already is.....Samsung s20 ultra Please fix the integration between apps, want to give you 5 stars Edit Still love the ap, the ads aren't bad. it still won't let you link to expense iq. It keeps telling you to download and install before you can link....had both for years...please fix so I can raise stars...

Been using this for years and years with no issues. That being said, I must add that ads are becoming intrusive and I may look for an alternative if it gets worse. Edit: now looking for an update. When you're waiting for this app to load and run an ad while you're trying to figure out a tip is nongood for me.

It works well, but lots of ads. They say if you download Expense IQ you'll get the pro version for free. I downloaded it and went through all the steps and saw the "overview" screen, but upon going back to the calculator I still have the free version and not the pro-version?

Works fine but all they want is for you to pay to upgrade to Pro. Lots of large obnoxious and intrusive pop up ads even just while in the settings. Want to save default tax rate? Pay for pro Want to tip off pre-tax amnt? Pay for pro It's cheap like $2, but screw that. I immediately uninstalled this and downloaded an actually free one that saves both of those important settings for free

Used this app for years and absolutely loved it. Could pull it up quick and calculate tips and split checks in a snap. Now there are fullscreen ads that just waste time and cause headaches. Downloaded the sister app to "allegedly" get free upgrade to pro version with no luck. I got the confirmation that it was upgraded but nothing changed. Still have ads and I don't see any options on playstore or in settings to switch. .... will edit my review if this gets fixed.

Using since 2016 and was great but now full screen ads get in way. When you're at a restaurant or appointment you don't want ads to pop up when you're trying to use this app quickly so you can pay. I found another app with no pop ups so I uninstalled Tip n Split.

I really like this app, if only there was a way to purchase it without the damn adds, especially the ones that randomly pop up trying to use the app. Cuz then, I'd give it the 5 stars it deserves. I paid for a lifetime subscription to the Expense IQ app which is supposed to upgrade the Tip N Split app to the pro version. I had no problem until the app was recently updated. My Tip N Split app now has annoying ads. I received a response from developer, Handy Apps, stating they would fix this issue in next update. 2 updates later and still not working! I spoke to Google support and they are useless, too! Save your money, avoid them!

been using app for long time, ads appeared prior to closing, with recent updates ads appear at the start, and are hard to close, I am considering uninstalling and finding another app that has less intrusive ads, my suggestion is to pass on this one!

This is app is junk, it says get pro version free if you download expense Iq. So I download expense Iq and buy lifetime of that only to not have a pro version and have a bunch ads, deleted both and staying away from this developer. One thing to have ads but to be bombarded no Thank you.

This app works GREAT never have problems with it. I want to add a request for this app to retain the memory of the previous purchase history so when you open the app again the information would be retained incase one happens to forget to write the information down in their balance book.

used to be good until they start noisy ad. In addition, a deceptive tactic of luring to install another APP from their company with the promise of FREE upgrade to PRO version. Don't trust this company anymore. There are so many alternatives.

App is described. The ads are not intrusive, I just know to mute the volume because they typically are loud but often can be skipped or aren't long. I think I did actually start playing a game that I saw in an ad. Since the app is as described, which is rare with apps, I have no problem with the loud ads and wouldn't be opposed to paying a one-time fee just to support it.

Annoying ads every time. VERY disruptive ads, some even start blasting audio as soon as you open the app. PRO non ad based version available on IPhone but not Android! I would happily pay to stop the ads! I'm looking for a new app calculator. It's a shame because, functionally, this is a good app. Unskippable Video ads with Sound!! On that note UNINSTALLED!!

Great app, however (DEV), can you enable modifying the total $ to receive the % tip you intend to give. I want to make whole number bills and don't want to fiddle with the % to a make whole number. If you add this I'll change this rating to 5 star!!!! Not a fan of ads but I hate them on all platforms. Wouldn't mind paying for no ads with a one time charge. Thanks!

I always struggle with tip amounts so this is nice and uncomplicated. input the amount of the bill, adjust the amount you wish to tip and boom. the app tells me the correct amount to add. sensational.
not worth 10 dollars , especially with the convience of AI. gemini , chat gpt does all this and more. not saying free, but not worth 10 dollars for no ads.
WAS a good app. NOW while trying to use at a restaurant, you have to watch a lengthy 25 + sec. advertisement which is really annoying before you can use it. Such BS. Goodbye just deleated app.
This is so convenient and easy. You can also share the results of the tip calculator using text, so everyone can see the cost.
easy to use and splitting the bill into multiple splits for more people is easier than a regular calculator

It's a nice app and seems to work well. However, there are other tip calculators out there that work just as well and are ad free so I'm going with one of the others (I belive there is an ad free version of this but you have to pay for the app).

They used to only have banner ads, understandable. Now there's constant pop ups that interrupt while you're calculating and it's such a pain. You have to wait for the ad to finish to continue. It's not worth the stress of using it.

used to love this app, but now the ads are really annoying. You used to be able to skip them after a few seconds, but the last two times I had to sit through a 1:15 ad for Temu (an app that I will absolutely never download) just to get the tip calculated. Time for a new tip calc.

I was never quick in math and it's a bit embarrassing when I'm at a salon and trying to figure out a tip amount. This app is really handy and I dont keep my stylist waiting but better yet, I dont screw up and under tip her! Gotta keep her happy as it took me 11 years to find her!😁

A very self intuitive app that is practically zero effort to use and very convenient for those times you have to calculate mixed party table bolling or simply dont feel like calculating your tip or no pen/pencil is available and your math skills are rusty. Very cool, very useful. Whip it (out) and tip it tool.

I used to love this app however making the ad pop up and me having to wait is too much. I get you want to make money. However I've found a new app that has the adds at the bottom a lot less obtrusive. So I will be removing this one..
Very quick and easy to get the correct tip.

This is a easy fantastic App. Bonus points to me: Ease of use and breakdowns. Groups of numbers can be divided. say there are 5 people and you want take total can break not only price with tip and how much each pays.. the slider works very easily..

Easy to use. SCREEN LARGE ENOUGH TO SEE EVEN IN LOW DINING LIGHT..I also like/enjoy the easy slide percentage bar to select tip amoint you wish to apply. Fast & Simple..Just wish there were an easier way to share the site with friends, you can't copy & paste to send to others to use...

Love having this when we go out to eat! Sometimes I'm in middle of coversation when paying bill, this app makes it effortless to pay tip w/out having to put much thought into it or refrains from accidentally writing wrong total because your math was wrong. Easy peasy!

Just makes life easier. After enjoying a meal, when the server is exceptional we give a really good tip. If not, the minimum... Nice not to have to try to figure out what to leave in my head. I suck in math! LOL
Was working great as I had the free app, but then purchased the full version. It is now cutting off the digits on the tip and total fields in half after the decimal point. Not good.
Super easy and quick to use.

Most people don't realize that Food Servers and Bartenders in the United States of America make well under $3.00 an hour!!! Yes we get tips, but they rarely reflect the total of a bill. Often we get Nothing!!! PLEASE USE THIS APP!!! To help you recognizing the people who are serving you a meal, or a drink, or parking your car!. Ect... A fair and decent amount. This is how we pay our bills, put food on our tables, feed our children! Thank You !

Too many adds pop up while you input data. For example when i type in $20 an add pops up as soon as i type 2 so then have to start over, very annoying. Should show ad when open app not interrupt when putting in figure's
Obnoxious ads. I get that you need to make money on a free app but when the ads play before you can even calculate a tip and they're over 10 seconds long at times... Nah. I'll find another app.
Great App but the ads are a pain

Extraordinary helpful when it comes to quick calculations! Especially for delivery, sorting & packing personnel. Very handy when you want to summarize costs in case you want to be a more efficient tipper when it comes to inflation, such as proper math to adequately cover gas, labor, material & regional costs of utility.
I like how easy it is to be able to tip appropriately.....!!

Great app but now full screen ads that you can't get out of and have to restart the app are very uncool. Updated: Now the full screen ads play sound and you can't skip them. It just gets worse. Dropping my rating.

A great time saver app. Leave the pencil and paper home. Because of this app, I don't over or under tip our server. When we are out with multiple couples no problem when figuring out the breakdown per couple.
it's OK, but when you try to do a quick calculation of the tip, an ad pops up, might I say a very long ad. so you can't calculate anything until its over.

Love th his app. Very easy to use. My husband can't wait for the bill now when we eat out so he can use it. Also like that it will split the bill....HOWEVER, I have already rated this app as you can see.. WHY DO YOU KEEP ASKING?? Still like it, quit asking for a rating..

This Tip Calculator is The Best, and its Very Easy to use. I have it On All my Devices. And it works Great on both iPhone and Samsung/Android Products. Try it, You won't Be Disappointed. Thank You App maker 🤗👍👍2022, and it's still the BEST.
Full screen ads.! Well this app seems to work well. The full screen adds that pop up before you can even use it . As well as the duration of the ads is more than annoying.

the Tip calculator app is the best tool for any specific high costly restaurants, if you don't have a mind that is good for math and you find yourself in a high costly restaurant and you don't know how to pay a check when on a date 🌹 or having a meal with family and friends, this app is the best for me, if you are looking for a better way for a successful opportunity for any calculator app this is the one for you.👍😃
I need this app and use it daily! I won't delete it on accident again! 😆
What happened, when did it become this bad. You open the app and before you even get a chance to so anything it shows you a 1 minute non-skippable ad.
It works as it should. Very handy. I upgraded to the "no ads" for $3, out of basic annoyance. If it changes for the better, I'll add the extra star.

It works perfect. Now when I go out to eat or go to get my nails done or to the beauty shop or to The Barbers I don't have to worry about how much to tip anybody. This gives me exactly what I need to know for any amount.
Let's me easily delete the amount entered without having to hit the backspace button multiple times, and it also correctly places the dollar and cents amounts around the decimal point.
Tip calculator simple works great 0 problems. App does not help you find restaurants app. Does not do anything else. It's just a simple calculator that works great.

Good app for me to go up and beyond for excellent and even bad service. I work hard for my $$$ and I feel like a server or host should be paid accordingly. This app allows me to decide what is your best tip.

it works quick easy my kids think it's fun...like their little way of contributing...mom can I leave the tip?lol they just put the bill amount in put what percentage we want to leave and then it calcs. the tip amount. great app!
It's great to have. Not all restaurants have receipts with the breakdown of tips so I download the app and very worth it. No adds or opinions of any kind. Just use and enjoy.
While at IHop eating breakfast, we used the app. It was easy to use and quick to navigate. I saved money by not guessing. Will use again.
I dont like the ads that pop up during use. I would rather pay $1 for the ap and eliminate the ads. Please make purchasing app an option.
I like this tip calculator alot,it's quick and easy to use. I eat in restaurants several times a week and this tip calculator comes in handy.
Simple, clean, easy to use. It is a good app for calculating tips. I like that it lets you split the bill and also that it can round the total.
When ads pop up immediately it makes it difficult to calculate the tip quickly. I know I could subscribe but not interested.
It's very fast only took less than a minute to figure out the correct tip amount awesome. I will use it every time I'm out for dinner.

Excellent app. Use it all the time when going to restaurants. Great job! Is this supposed to work with Android 10 and above? I noticed the target API is ANDROID PIE. Can you update to work with Android 10, 11, & 12?

I don't think any other tip calculator is nearly as good as this one, and I've tried others. I just wish it had a better looking icon. But I won't switch to another one. I haven't looked but I'll bet every user gives this app a 5 star rating.
Annoying ads and would be great if the 'round up' option made the tip and total even, whole numbers instead of including change.

Went to oyster bar In Fayetteville, NC. Wanted to tip our exceptional waitress. I know that most up scale restaurants recommend 15% tips. Tiffany was exceptional, and we gave her 30% tip with the help of this app.

I really enjoy using this app tip Calculator. I will start letting friends and family about this app, The design is user friendly and really helpful for me and I am sure others will 👍. Once again it is a great app and to the designer 💯 ❗
It's easy and accurate. You can look up any percentage. You can split. Love this tip calculator.
Functionally fine but full screen ads are not cool. Uninstalling and will not buy pro version just to avoid annoyances. Good riddance.
Simple to use. Auto adjust calculation as you adjust or add another split in tipping. Really like!
I've used many tip charts, but this one is the best. Giving you the tip, and the split charge. Love it!
Ads are a pain. Plenty of free ad-less tip calculators out there. Don't waste your time on this one.
It's a Good one and easy ,there is an option of rounding up that you can't use cause It's on top of some other option , but other than that it is kosher....
This app comes in handy over and over...I'm not a mathematical genius so a little help leaving a decent tip appreciated. It's quick and user friendly! A+++
Can't get it to fit my phone screen. It cuts off the right side, so you can't see the last number ($23.0?) Annoying.
Was a great app. Now unskippable FULL PAGE! ads for 5 to 10 seconds while you are trying to pay your bill. 5 stars to trash! DO NOT USE!
This is really good for people who can't ever figure out how much to tip. Enter the amount on the bill, tell them how much you want to tip and it'll tell you exactly what the tip would be.
This is app is awesome. I love it!!! It really comes in handy for you to know exactly how much to tip your server/host. I highly recommend everyone download this app and use it
I used to like this app, but the adds are now intrusive and annoying. It takes over when trying to use the app. I'm uninstalling this app and looking for a new one.
The app was fast and gives you the option to change the percentage of the tip if you like. It is also easy to read therefore the 5 stars.

I love this app. People work hard for their money and I think it is important to leave an appropriate tip, this makes it quick and easy and especially when you're with friends and need to split the bill!
the ads were okay now they are getting unbearable. I'm willing to pay for an ad free experience but this doesn't appear to have that option. I'm shopping for a new one.
Easy to use and accurate. Excellent for calculating exactly what you should tip based on how you rate your server. Very much recommended.
Ads ads ads. Cannot use unless you watch an ad. Cannot quickly tip and leave. An actual calculator is faster.
Would've given a higher rating. Give user the ability to change the screen size so we can see better. Dont want to change all apps sizes just this one.
It's a great app to have, if you're like me and unsure of how much to tip not wanting to tip too much or too little this app is just right!
I love the little app. I hate that the round up and down buttons are covered by share and other buttons so they are unusable. It makes the screen cluttered.
Not sure how much to leave your server? Install this app and it will tell you how much. Enter the bill amount choose whether it's 10% or more and it will let you know how much to tip.
Very helpful to have this app on my phone when I'm not sure how much to tip at restaurants and beauty salons!
Average at best. Does have ads in the app! Minus 15, for that BS!!! Does work... Not Dark, white an bright!
Always good to know how much to tip for any kind of service I get and not question myself if I tip enough or go over my budget.

Does a great job. -2 star because the tip percentage caps at 30% - based on on service I will tip higher than that. I start at 30 and based on the service go up or down. Increase the % to more than 50% or remove the cap completely and I will gladly change my rating.
Tip rounding issue: if you set the tip amount and press round up, then decide to round down, you can't.
Good app to figure out discounts when you are in stores that have the precentage off without a final price.
Accurate and helpful, especially when lots is happening and one can't focus on mentally figuring a tip.
Nice app, easy to use. It's free with some adds of course but they are not intrusive.
great app! what a difference when you can learn the amount of the tip you should leave without trying to figure it out. I love this!
Easy to use and has nice options like bill splitting, tip %age and round up or down.
The app is great to use, just find all the advertisements annoying that pop up while trying to use it.
The App worked well. I just didn't like the ads. But over all well made app and easy to use.
so far so good, I'm very bad at math, so I really appreciate having this app to figure out what percentage to tip. It's user friendly too.
Finally have been able to stop scrounging around in my wallet looking for my percentages tip card. A real time saver for me.Thanks !!!
This app is very helpful. I don't have to try to figure out how much I should give in tips matter what percentage I choose to give
Easy to use. If the admins could add the places or restaurants, that would be great!
This app is Fantastic when you need it it works well it's easy to use. But I just didn't need it as much as I thought so I deleted it
I never have an actual tip calculator before, I can use it as a business person cashing in my items.
Very handy app for when your brain isn't just quite clicking making the tip easier to figure for mediocre to excellent service!
Great to have and so easy to use. Make dividing bills when out in groups fast and accurate
it's a great tool I enjoy using it. my only issue are the commercials that pop while I am trying use the app.

This app allows me to make on the spot business sales. This is the greatest app I ever used. I've used this app it seems like a lifetime. It's amazing and I have never had a problem. Thank you for making the greatest app of the universe.. Tom

Close. But could use some polish. Main thing. What is meant by "Bill Amount"? I was using a tip calculator where "Bill Amount" was the food and services before taxes. For a while, I thought this app couldn't add. And why does the tip slider go to 100%? Less range would make the to rate easier to set. Love the ability to enter tax directly. Each city in my area has a different tax rate so a % doesn't work.

Good app and without ads! It's straight forward with calculating tip, and I like the ability to add tax into the equation. I think the only thing more I'd like to see is a round off to the nearest dollar toggle. Edit: Thanks, I found the rounding toggles but it's only selectable if the change amount is above 90 cents for USD. It would be nice if you could toggle it at any amount to round to the nearest dollar on the 50 split. So 2.03 rounds to 2.00 and 2.50 rounds to 3.00

Wonderful Tip Calculator!! Nice clean interface, super easy to use, NO ADS 👍 Love ♥️ it so much I deleted the one I had for years. Excellent job 👏 to the creator of this outstanding tip app. Thank You!!
Very handy and useful tool.

This is a perfect app so not sure why it's not 5 stars. I have been looking for a simple tip calculator to use here and there and this is the one. The previous apps were all filled with ads and were clunky. This is clean, precise and simple. I'm so glad I found this! Thank you!

played with a few equations, and so far it works, I'm giving it five stars because there's no ads, but I have a question, I'm hoping you see this, how can we further support this simple useful app , so that you can keep on updating it as necessary ?
perfect free tip calculator app. got to rate high for no annoying ads or in app purchases. Keeps it simple, yet looks great.
Exactly what I was looking for! You can even round up and down your total after setting your tip percentage. Thanks for the great app!
A simple but Awesome tip calculator. No ads and other extra stuff you don't need.
it let's you into the tax percentage but doesn't actually calculator it nor adds it to the total.
Exactly what I wanted. Fast and easy. No more guesswork when tipping. Thank you!
Perfect! everything you when dining out with friends and sharing the bill.

perfectly simple and useful
this is a life savor

playStoreReviews.text: I was debating between this and another app. but after trying to add items, KP made it quicker and easier. just a couple taps and less typing. Would be nice if I could go back to recently scanned items by tapping them below the scanner but that's just more convenient than an issue. Thanks for helping me clean out my kitchen!

love this app!! I LOVE the pantry and the ability to see what ingredients I already have for a recipe. this app is making meal planning, grocery shopping, and kitchen inventory a breeze for me and my family!! The option to do a lifetime purchase instead of a monthly/annual subscription is a huge plus. my only problem with this app is just that some recipes don't import from certain websites. this is my favorite pantry organizer/recipe storage/meal planning app that I've found!

I really like this app, for the most part. I went to add a couple items to my inventory today, though, and most of my items I had already logged are missing!!! This is frustrating. For some reason it first said I didn't have an account, so then it said to sign up or sign in. I signed in and now most of my stuff that I already had logged is no longer there!

incredible app! worth the premium subscription. I scanned everything in our kitchen and it's made a huge difference, the recipes are really good and the ability to add your own recipes is excelent. adding food to our planner updates our pantry. from the amount of oil I use to how many eggs I can't believe it! if you want to organize your kitchen and reduce waste, know just how long you have until expiration dates and even what you need to pick up on your next shopping trip this is the app!

It's a wonderful app to keep track of what's in your pantry. You can download your entire pantry inventory and make your own grocery list like I did. The app's suggestions for meals with what's in stock is really helpful on those days when you are pressed for time and clueless on what to fix for dinner. It's very easy to scan each item before putting it on a shelf. I highly recommend KitchenPal.

I love the app, and only wish there was a way to sort by type of food. It would be great to be able to plan my menu based on whatever meat I have in the freezer, or what veggies I have. Also, in order to change the name of an item, is my only option to delete it and re-enter it? Thanks. UPDATE: I still love this app and the new features, and tried to share the app with my family. I sent the link that the app provided, but they got an error message. What am I doing wrong?

Fantastic app. One of the few out there worth purchasing and just does what it states. It definitely took us a bit to get into the habit of adding things but once we did, the app greatly helped in lessening our food waste and stopped us from buying extras of what we already had. Also shout out to the dev team for developing an optimized, responsive app and being open to suggestions

Works great. It's helping us get track of what we have in our freezer. I upgraded lasy month so I can additional storage spaces so I can keep track of what is where. And I am able to share my inventory with my household! I have 1 minor complaint - It is SLOW. Slow when creating a new item, slow during item search. But most frustrating is it's slow on the initial load. I have a lot of stuff logged, so I'd be tempted to blame this, but this load has been slow from day 1.

One of the better kitchen keepers I've tried so far. It would be amazing if I could do a batch import of my foods, similar to how the app is set up to do a batch export. Sometimes the app runs a little slow when trying to get everything catalogued, which makes it a little tedious. Additionally, not all of the recipes that I find in the app can successfully be added to the meal planner, which is frustrating.

The app is decent but : It doesn't tell you how many of the 100 free scans you got left. The nutritional assessment is mostly incorrect I cant add expiration date of 31 dec 2025, it always set for 2026. It should enable you to switch storage as some are just incorrect That said , is a good app overall, but needs some polishing for me to decide to buy it at least. The scan feature is perfect, quick and reliable, the database of products is very good!

I am glad to have found this app! I tried to manage my fridge/freezers with whiteboards, but it quickly became unsustainable with the amount of time it took to update and reorganize after shopping. KitchenPal not only solves this issue, but it also adds other features such as remote access (checking inventory while at the store), sharing between family members, shopping lists, recipes from your ingredients, and so many more. I am so happy to have become a lifetime member.

This is an awesome app. You pick recipes to cook for the week, it puts the ingredients on a list for you, you mark off what you already have and it has in app links to Walmart grocery, Kroger, instacart, etc. It not only takes you to the site but imports your list as well and looks up each item, which you can check off and purchase. Awesome!

Positives: lets you track whats in your pantry/fridge & create recipes based on what you have and allows you to create shopping lists based on what you dont. Helps you calculate how many calories a day and helps you pick recipes based on that too. Negatives & this is a big one: NOT americanized. most recipes are under metric measurements (which I could of put up with) but the pantry photos & recipes are for items not even available in my country vs generic choices. And no way to substitute.

I love that I can add the photos to the items and the look and view of everything. One major flaw is I can not edit the name or add a quantity. I saved the product quickly figuring I could edit the title later and it won't allow me to do it. Please add that feature. This would get a 5 star from if it had those two major feautures because it works for what I need.

Cool idea, but terribly limited. Many UPC come up with the wrong info or no info at all, requiring the user to manually input data and pics. The shopping list is clunky, with annoyances like deleting items that you don't purchase on a single trip. I wish I hadn't subscribed so quickly. Keep continues to be a better solution for me.

Using the free part, you're only able to have 12 items per category; regardless if you put in an expiration date or not. It's nice that you can create new items, but you have to associate them with general items already in their lists in order to get recipes. I started with canned goods, and most bean types were not listed. I stopped there and uninstalled. It could be a good app eventually, but needs some work. At this point, I'm not willing to pay.

I have been downloading almost every application to find a good grocery list app that I like. although I don't love this application, I feel that this is one of the better ones. I just want simple with more suggestion items for my list. The recipes in here are not appealing, they need work there; add more recipes. It is a good start for the app. Would love to find an app that makes my list with many icons..but after I add the item to my list, the application also would search for coupons

Don't waste your money. I downloaded it, was trying to load all my data, and had limitations. So I decided to try premium. Well, after dropping $12, I don't see any added features, it's still restrictive as to describing products, then it locked up my whole phone when I tried to scan barcodes. I deleted it. I'd like my money back.

The categories that it places food in are not accurate. It says you can change them, but only in some cases, and only using their very limited categories. It doesn't recognize fresh foods. It says the free version holds up to 100 food items, but it only allowed 50 before it required me to share the app with others. You can find a recipe based on 1 food item, but not multiple foods, so you may not come close to what you are seeking. Really, just too many obvious problems to continue after 1 day.

We had a lot of waste trying to meal plan from work post-covid. I wanted an app that would quickly / accurately scan our pantry to help us like we were still at home. Sharing the app has let us show our older kids what's in the cupboard to eliminate "I didn't know we had that!" waste. I wanted meal suggestions that they could make with what we have. This covers all the bases and seems to work splendidly. We had one issue with registering but the team fixed it in < 24 hours - great!

I just started using the app, and I've hit quite a few issues, as listed below 1) New/created ingredients won't save 2) I can't change inaccurate information for food I scan 3) There's neither an option to name a quantity of a product nor a level of a single ingredient (full, half, etc.) 4) Maybe I don't have enough ingredients, but I can't figure out how to use the smart cooking feature for what I have in stock 5) Everything is in grams and such, so I don't have a real concept of what's left

Barely works. Barcode scanner wont find ANYTHING, and its all name brand products. After typing in all the information and hitting save, THEN it will actually find the product most of the time. However, when you then click Add To Kitchen, it wont let you select whether to save in pantry,freezer or fridge...it just seems to add it wherever randomly. So you have to select the products one by one and change the storage option to move it to your freezer or wherever you wanted it in the first place

The pantry scanning app was okay, but adding something new (such as the obscure stuff I bring back from overseas) is tedious at best. I'm also not at all impressed with the recipe import from online sources. Seemed overly picky on the recipe site format, sometimes claiming a perfectly fine site as unreadable or invalid. And since there's no web browser extension of site to work together with this app, there's no means of going from an online recipe on a PC browser to this app. It has potential.

The interface is slick but limited. You cannot add an item, just select from a limited menu. Quantities can only be entered in predetermined servings, not ounces. Multiple individual packages of the same item of different sizes cannot be entered. I was looking for an inventory system, not shopping and cooking advice.

I'm still adding ingredients in but it is taking me longer because I have to plug in the expiration date more than once since most of the time it doesn't save the first time, which gets frustrating after a while. Also, a lot of the products are not in the system so I have to create most of them. But I'm still in the first few days, hoping to really enjoy it after finish adding everything.

After reviewing information about Kitchenpal, It was a no-brainer to sign up for the premium lifetime option. I needed some help after sharing my kitchen with family. Even though it was late Eastern time, their team replied to my email in very short order. I did what they asked me to do and it resolved my issue. They followed up with me within a few minutes to be sure I was satisfied with the result. It was so easy to add items, and I can't wait to utilize all the other planners & features!!!

I was able to scan many items into the inventory! At times tried to enter new items but, found it to be too cumbersome. I barely had time to get a feel for the app before it stopped allowing me to scan after 100 items. Needless to say I will not be spending any money getting to know this any better! Reply to below: as I explained above it does not work well to add manually. I don't care if it was free to use.

The app is great and does what it claims to do, and quite a bit more. The organizational boost of having my entire inventory available at all times is wonderful. Also important to mention is that they provide amazing support. I am absolutely content with my purchase of the lifetime family subscription. Definitely would recommend. The only real critiques I have are that the shopping could be streamlined a bit, and I would love to be able to restrict recipes by calories. By the way - not a bot. 😁

I am disappointed in the purchased version, as "uploading your own recipes" is misleading. You can only upload FULLY described recipes WITH an image and must wait for "approval" to use them...so they're not for helping you ensure you have ingredients on hand--they're for everyone to access. And you cannot customize available recipes, so if you don't want meat in your biscuit and gravy recipe then you'll always appear to missing that ingredient. I bought a year but it's not really what I want.

The barcode scanner is phenomenal and enters about 95% of the things I try, even generics and store brands. The expiration date feature is awesome, especially for things like milk. But the idea that I can't just save my own recipes (and I shouldn't have to publish them) is awful. And when I tell it "give me drink recipes with only these 5 ingredients" it gives me everything from quinoia to cheesecake to pancakes. Either I'm too dumb to use the app, or it doesn't do what I need.

I left a review yesterday. Just wanted to add that I'm getting less excited about this app. The first recipe I tried I got 5 steps into and it called for an ingredient it doesn't tell you you need. I can't go get it, so the recipe dissolved into buttered noodles and garlic. Which I don't need an app to make. Still gonna try the app for a while longer, but so far its managed to bungle up its major selling point. And the recipe selection isn't impressive

I LOVE this app. Not only is the customer service amazing but the organization of my kitchen is so much better now. You can have different types of storage so you know where your items are located. Premium membership let's you share your shopping list with others so they can add on to it. My favorite part is the expiration dates and that it uses what I have to suggest a meal.

This app is an absolute life changer! It has allowed me and my girlfriend to take control of what we have on hand, and eat healthier, while saving time. We also are able to enjoy what we have on hand more thanks to the built in recipes search. It will tell you what you can make off of what you have and prompt you on what's going to expire soon automatically. It even gives you a shopping list for what you need. The developer even responds quickly when you message them. Can't recommend it enough.

This app is helping us save money and time! We set the different locations where we store food and goods and when we use them, we remove it from the list. No more unnecessary purchases. I always bought too many things because I wasn't sure if I had an ingredient for a recipe I wanted to make. Found out I have 3 bottles of BBQ sauce and 1 in the fridge! Just purchased the lifetime membership. Also, I want to thank the KitchenPal App Team for helping so quickly with a mistake I made.

I really really love this app and cannot believe it is free! For years I've been looking for an app that would allow me to take an accurate inventory - using barcode scanning (I have 3 kids and ain't nobody got time to type everything in) and this app does THAT ! AND DOES IT WELL. It even worked on aldi and generic brands! I'm high impressed. We've saved so much money and food already - it's so helpful to be able to pull up what I have at home when I'm at the grocery store or meal planning.

Very nicely put together, but requires your email just to use normal functions. Limited to no information for exotic produce items, beyond basic fruit and vegetables. Inputting your own details for items requires you to connect it to another on their search results. Ultimately, there are other apps that don't require your information, or try to sell a premium membership.

I got your email, thank you. It's just difficult to go through and update the categories for all items. I went to open my app today and it asked me to sign in. Once signed in, it shows zero items. In my profile, it says I have 448 products in the kitchen, apparently I just can't see them. I tried changing the view and it didn't make a difference. I also can't perform a search.

Love the app. The ability to track expiration dates is awesome. Also, I really appreciate the accessibility of the nutritional information at my fingertips. I'm on a very strict medical diet, and this is making my meal planning a lot easier. I have one suggestion, though. I'd like to have the ability to search for items alphabetically. As it is, locating specific items is a bit cumbersome. I look forward to your updates.

KitchenPal is close to being the grocery inventory app that I dreamed of, but it is not perfect. THE issue that could cause me to just stop using it is adding grocery items to KitchenPal and then changing the item description in the app to suit my unusual filing system. I get the impression that I'm "updating" the KitchenPal Universal Database each time I do so. If so OK, but I DON'T want item descriptions uploaded by other Users to change my item descriptions and mess up my filing system!!

Overall this app is definitely a 9/10. There is some room for improvement though. Sharing kitchen across devices is amazing, bar code scanning is awesome despite having to enter any generic foods manually (consider adding this as built in option please). The units of measurement and quantity need refinement as there isn't a way to add fractional items or partial inventory ie half box of macaroni? The recipe suggestion and lookup is terrible this need to be boxed up. URL link recipes instead.

I've downloaded to my tablet and to my phone. I signed up and it gave any error. I deleted and tried again. This time is said sign in.. I guess it got me signed up, but now it says it can't connect to the server. Maybe y'all are down for maintenance or something. I was so excited to find this app. Not so much now. Please let me know so that i can try again. FYI, i connected through Google, which i do with all my apps. Also, no problem with connecting to other games and apps right now, just this.

Update: App is very good at keeping your kitchen organized. Most items I can scan the barcode and they are recognized. Customer support is very responsive, and responds to queries quickly and efficiently. 2/27/21 Just started using this app and I think it's great and really does what I need it to do. I would love the ability to mark something as non-food so that it doesn't ask me for nutrition info. 😁

I love the concept, however, it will not allow you to modify where the app puts the products. For example, it placed the ranch dressing in the pantry category. I keep my ranch in the refrigerator. Also, I freeze a lot of my meat when I buy it but it automatically puts all the meat in the refrigerator. I even upgraded to the premium and it still just puts the products wherever it wants. Not happy about this.

It's ok. It assigns many items to the wrong storage - frige vs freezer vs panrty. Spaetzel is not a beverage. Just because something is a liquid doesn't mean it is a beverage (sweetened condensed soy milk). Fixing it involves going into each item individually to reassign it. If you don't assign an expiry date, guess what? It is assigned an expiration date of today! Do you have one item in the frige and the other three on the shelf? It's not that smart. If you have many items, the app bogs down. Use categories in addition to storage categories would be useful. I have Spices (storage category) that I keep in the refrigerator.

My cousin bought this for me for a birthday present. Originally, the subscription wouldn't go through, but an email over to the support team fixed it real quick. Took like 5 seconds. It was great! While the many app features are incredibly useful, the one I want to highlight the most is the recipes system. It is an ever-growing list of recipes submitted by the users themselves. So if you don't see a recipe, just go ahead and make one! I love this whole app. I'd swear it was designed just for me

Can't sign up for premium, keeps saying I have no connection. Most of the recipes are wrong, and it's not possible to see the original recipe. Example:there is a ham macaroni and cheese recipe that says its "pork-free". I sent the devs a list of screenshots of items that are wrong, sometimes ridiculously so:milk scanned as bullets, and a jar of pickles scanned as an Amazon Fire tablet... Maybe they would be better licensing their scanning tech to Yummly?

The program obviously has potential, but unfortunately, many things still need to be fixed and improved. And first of all, the server speed - it takes too much time to search for the product and update it. I am not at all sure that the program will work if there is no Internet. Update: minus two stars. Recipes section is bad. You cannot control your own recipe after submitting. Cannot edit or delete. Unacceptable.

Installed yesterday, I've had a shopping list app but it didn't allow for pantry inventory which Kitchenpal does. Had to spend the $30 to upgrade to professional since the free only allows 99 pantry items plus other limitations. It's well worth it. One suggestion is when adding an item to shopping list instead of having to click add item and then add to shopping list it would be much better just to have a single add to shopping list button (double buttons are redundant)

Paid the higher price for the one time purchase. I keep getting an error message and I was unable to delete or update items in my kitchen. I emailed and the only response I received was they wanted to know if anyone else was experiencing the same issue. I requested a refund since the app clearly didn't work and was denied. Also found out they had a data breach and potentially had customers information stolen. Would not recommend this app.

I really love the concept of this app! I feel as though I am always throwing food out that I forgot that I had, and expires. Or, I'll buy an item at the store that I already had 2 of in my home. This is a great way for my husband and I to keep a full inventory of everything in our kitchen. I REALLY like the feature of the app alerting you when food is about to expire. I'm looking forward to using this app more. Tech support is great, and promptly handled a small issue I had while signing up

This app is very easy to use and it has been a life saver and money saver. It definitely helps us keep from overbuying certain items and it helps us keep track of what we have which makes it easier when meal planning and grocery shopping. Scanning all of the items in is great, I highly recommend this app if you need help keeping track of items in your kitchen without opening cabinets, fridge or pantry. It will help generate shopping lists too based on inventory you input!

It's a no for me. The features sound and look great. I tried to create a list and added about 10 things to the list just for only 4 of them to show. I tried going out of the app and back in to see if they would appear but nothing. I tried to re-add the items to the list, but that dint work either. It stopped being able to recognize basic items like broccoli and would say that I needed to create the item. I created it and it still would not add to the list. Not the app for me

I've been having a problem with disappearing expiry dates on my items. Through trial and error, I've discovered that both increasing or decreasing an item's count will clear the expiry field for that item. It happens on both the storage list or the individual item page. For example, I'll create a single pantry entry quantity of 12 items along with the expiry date for those items, which is obviously the same for all qw. When we use an item, the expiry is gone. What do I do to prevent this?

I love this app, immediately decided to purchase premium. However the more I use it the more performance issues I have. Frequent connection error timeouts and spinning wheel when I try to add/update inventory or modify shopping lists. I have fast cable Internet and 5g cellular but encounter this on both. Other than that it's excellent and I'll modify my review if they can fix these issues. Just not good enough performance for a paid app.

I just downloaded it today. It is a bit tedious getting started, but most of the things that I have scanned are scanning properly. because I use a lot of generic type products or product-specific to my area, I am adding them to the database, just as I have with my Fitbit application. I think that this app has some great potential, and I am looking forward to continuing to use and learn more about it. Profile page--needs to be dropped down choices, not calendar.

Love this app. As a prepper it is exactly what I am looking for to manage my food supplies. It has also helped to let us know that we already had an item in stock and did not need to buy it again. I also like the history so we know how often we go through an item. It is easy to use and the customer service was excellent. What I would like to see in future updates is to be able to edit/delete stock locations, and to be able to set target amounts.

easy to add items to the pantry but sometimes glitches and adds it multiple times and when you delete the extra one it deletes both. sometimes glitches when trying to move items from one location to another. the recipe option has no understanding of the ingredients. example: rice cakes cannot be used as rice or egg drop soup as eggs. so I don't even bother with trying to use that function, which I would really like to utilize.

Items get deleted when you run out and then you have to rescan each time. Because there's no zero balance items, you cant just look at your pantry to see what you need. Update. I have been using the app and I'm adding a 1 to each thing so I can look at my pantry and know what I'm out of (1=0). The labeling is a mess. I have to rename every item because when I want to see my "olives" I'm not going to be looking under "Aldi". Or "great value" when I wasn't too see how much ketchup I have.

Really underdeveloped app. Super laggy. Not worth paying a premium. Couldn't even leave feedback without selecting Google Play as the app source. Quantities are not standard. Doesn't have basic things like sliced turkey. Puts "everything" in the spices category and tedious to move to fridge or pantry. Put all our food in and only gives me recipes for dessert cakes and coconut curry chicken. We have a ton of food. Frustrating to spend so much time setting up just to have these limitations.

I just started using this. I'm really bad at keeping track of what I have on hand and keeping a grocery list. Using this app I can now just look at what I have and when it will be expiring in helping me figure out what I need to get. It will also help me stay more organized in keeping my fridge and pantry well stocked on the things I need. I love how it has the categories to look up it is so much easier for when making your list. I highly recommend using this app.

We have the premium version. It's a good app, however there are some things we don't like. More specifically the shopping list, very weird setup. When you used up a product it goes directly to the general shopping list (My List), not giving you the option to select the actual shopping list that you want it on. The only way to move it to the list you need is from the product profile in which case you cannot mark it as used up. Moreover, there is no way to move products between lists. Disappointed

Didn't even have it 30 minutes, scanned a few items and it suddenly stopped working. Update: I have re-downloaded the app and it appears to be working ok. Gave 4 stars instead of 5 because I do find the app to be a bit slow and laggy. I have tried it on different devices so the phone isn't the issue. Update: I went to start adding items for my freezer & it keeps getting SLOWER and SLOWER. I closed the app and it said I was logged out and it won't log me back in. I give up. Too much work!

Decent app!! Has separate tabs for fridge, freezer, pantry and more. My husband and I can connect on Android and iPhone and are able to both scan items in and it shows up. Some downsides are that is does crash and run really slow when using it and I wish it had more recipes that just stuff for my eggs (we do have more than eggs in our house haha) Overall, a decent app but with some improvements it could be awesome.

Don't waste your time. It is difficult to use, defaults to add items to places that you don't want, and does not allow you to move the items, such as when it defaulted to Fridge. I had originally chosen Pantry, then when I had to create a description for a bar code, it defaulted back to Fridge and every canned good I scanned after was added to Fridge. It did not allow me to move the items. If that is an option, it is definitely not easy to find or do. I deleted the app.

After manually adding sweet orange marmalade as an ingredient, I am shown a recipe for marmalade. Not helpful when I already have it and the app didn't recognize it. I also don't want to see recipes with "missing ingredients". I am specifically looking for help with the items in my house, not extra stuff I have to buy. Other than having to create several common ingredients, the app has real potential. A filter option for breakfast lunch and dinner would be great too.

Why when I'm under the freezer section, hit the plus button, type in 'burger patties' and make an entry and hit add the only option seems to add it to pantry then i have to drag it over to freezer? Edit: thank you for the reply, I was getting frustrated but altho it's a lil clunky I like the app, a surprising number of products were scannable which is convenient. Weird pics pop up sometimes but I like that I can just take a pic of mine. Still needs work but giving it a second try

Really good overall. The only issue I have is when adding a custom recipe, the measurements of teaspoon, tablespoon, cup are not available (I have it set to US measurements) and I don't want to convert everything to weights. I'd like the ability to add 1/2 increments of items. If I have 1 1/2 gallons of milk for example, right now it shows 2 until one is gone.

I enjoy how easy it is to scan items to have them recorded. I do find the categories to be off (how are cashews considered a "sweet"?) And I really don't enjoy the app telling me that having coconut oil in my pantry is a "poor choice". I cannot find a way to turn off that feature and I find it very annoying. But I think the ease of use, for the most part, outweighs those annoyances.

The overall layout and function of the app is easy to use and to understand. However, I have to agree with other reviews that there's not a whole lot in terms of recipes friendly to specific diets. Under the healthy food section there was fried hashbrowns, apple pies, and other baked goods. I think the developer needs to fine tune the apps overall sorting system. Or maybe moderate user submitted recipes a little more closely. Wish I could have kept using it!

After buying my sixth can of black beans and realizing we have three jars of thyme stashed in our cupboards I'm excited to have an app that my partner and I can both use and check when we're at the grocery store. I wanted this for inventorying dry goods, but interested to see how we use it for perishables as well. Maybe we'll even love the recipes! Right now, the main frustration is not being able to add / edit categories. I want to know what cupboard something is in or if it's stored away!

I got all the way through my pantry only to find out I can only manage a certain limit. When that limit has been hit, I have to buy premium or unlock the products. I was looking for an app that would make it easier to manage my food so I don't over buy. This is inconvenient considering I can't delete a certain product after using it. It also won't let you put a certain number of items. like canned goods for example. I can not put that I have multiple of this one thing. Deleting this app ☹

It has been great so far - just started today. The reason for 4 stars & not 5 is that it locks up often & has to be restarted, as well as suggests meat entrees, even though I changed my preferences to vegetarian. Not perfect, but will definitely help two very busy people know what we have & what we need! A few things I wish I could do.. 1) have other categories for items like paper towels, etc. or add custom categories. 2) add something in two places (ie one in fridge, one in pantry).

Exactly what I wanted! Needed an app to keep the pantry, freezer and fridge organized with no waste, so easy to use & set up - adjust for the number of a certain item, expiration dates, recipes, shopping list, and more. Intuitive, clean visuals. I'm a fan. Liked it so much I bought the Premium subscription for $12 bucks for the year! Keep up the good work.

It's definetly the best pantry organizer/tracker on the market as far as how much you can add to it. However, ever few adds I get the spinning wheel of death! It's extremely annoying to back out and force close each time this happens. Especially since it's my first time adding stuff, it's going to take me forever to add things. But I check out other apps, and they just don't compare to the options this one has. Please keep updating. :)

Has potential. It's cool that you can scan in your items and it does a good job, for the most part, of finding them. The recipes section was quite a bit lacking. I'd like to see more "simple" recipes available (for instance, if I have macaroni noodles and Velveeta cheese, then simple 2-ingredient Mac and cheese should show up). Mainly because it would be really cool to have the ability to "use" a recipe and it automatically remove that amount of product from your pantry.

Subscribe, it's well worth it for the increased flexibility of program. Pros, scanning, easy to add and subtract the number of items, easy to explore app without accidentally changing things. Con - I haven't figured out how to enter items in multiple places without scanning item multiple times or to move them from say, fridge downstairs to fridge upstairs. and where's the help menu? But I'm having fun figuring out and minimal frustration.

It's a solid app. The free version's not great but it's certainly enough for you to evaluate whether you want to shell out for the premium version. I'd do that but I'd REALLY like a webapp included on top of this. This is great for scanning and "gathering" your inventory but it's not so good for the sorting and manipulating that's better left to something with a real keyboard and a generous sized screen.

Neat idea for an app - it has most of the features I was looking for! I love that it lets me choose which category to file items under, & expiry dates. Downsides - it runs slowly and crashes often. The barcode scanner doesn't work so inputting your items takes a long time. It doesn't realize paprika and smoked paprika are two different spices so it keeps combining them into one which is super annoying. And I wish I could put in my own recipes that I use regularly, to make meal planning easier.

I'd been looking for the perfect kitchen organizer app for years. Kitchenpal isn't perfect, but it's the closest one I've found and has the most potential. I love the automatically adding low items to my shopping list & the expitation date warnings. You'll spend a couple of hours getting your food scanned into the app, but it is worth the effort. Not everything you scan is in the database, but it's also easier than most apps to add or modify items.

After a while, the barcode scanning functionality (and certain other features) gets hidden behind a paywall. You need to use WiFi to access your shopping list in a grocery store. It doesn't save your sorting method between sessions. If you just want to delete an item, it still gets added to your shopping list and you'll need to delete it there, too.

I love having an app that allows me to not only keep up with what's in my pantry but is easy to use. I just scan the barcode and I can even update the picture if I don't like the one that it defaults to. I also had a great and speedy response with the customer support email. I had a little trouble with getting the app to install on a new tablet but after a few days of them working with Google PlayStore they were able to resolve it ☺️. Definitely would recommend!!!

Loved this when I first installed, but as soon as I paid for premium it went downhill. Crashes all the time, voice search no longer works (worked initially, making adding items so easy, but now it just gives me a message saying it will send to Google for a transcript...which it never does). App only works for a few minutes and then freezes and crashes. If it worked consistently and voice worked, I'd give it 5 stars.

So far we're loving this app! We've been able to scan everything in the pantry and fridge and it's so nice to see what you have right at your fingertips. We plan on scanning more too. The reason I'm not rating 5 stars is because the app does crash occasionally. Not a huge deal and I haven't lost my info. Just an annoyance that makes things take longer when adding items. That being said, I would still 100% recommend this app! One of my favorite features is the recipes suggested based on dates!

The barcode scanning feature is the best part of the program. If you planning on tracking a lot of items you should look into a pc based database. It takes this program forever to respond after every entry. It crashes all the time, yet doesn't seem to lose data. Very aggravating to use because it is so slow ! ! Once it has your data there, there isn't much that it lets you do with your data, like a simple print out of what you got. I regret using this app for my food pantry project needs more simple database features to manipulate the food storage data the way we want !

This is a great app but lacking functionality and practicality. Adding things to the pantry is fairly easy. The barcode scanner works great and what can't be scanned can be added manually. I'm giving it 3 stars for a few reasons: 1) They say it's free, but after a certain number of items, you have to pay to add capacity to the pantry. 2) If you try to add a recipe, there's a lot of measuring metrics missing i.e., no cups, tsp, or tbsp).

It's pretty good, but it needs way more recipes. I have a similar app that produces hundreds more recipes I can make simply because it is more flexible on the ingredient substitutions. And as someone else mentioned, having smoked paprika and regular paprika in my kitchen seems to confuse the app. Sometimes it pulls up one after I select the other. Weird and annoying things like that. Also the drag and drop in the kitchen is very difficult for me, it zooms past the tab I try to put it into.

I started out really liking this app, but the more I use it the more problems I'm seeing. Example 1 - It takes forever to load when I first open the app. Example 2 - It randomly adds ingredients to my kitchen which confuses me on what I actually have and I have to manually delete them all. Example 3 - It won't let me add a picture to the items I create, it lets me take the picture and "okay it" but once I go off the app the picture deletes again. Very close to just finding a new app!

I liked the idea and the reviews are stellar. So I was about to buy the subscription, but then this thing started crashing every minute so I am not so sure now... Could be worse though - could have started crashing after I paid for the subscription :) Update: Tech support got in touch and were most helpful. So I gave this app another shot and I really like it. The recipes are good and refreshing, and my first grocery bill was 50% lower than usual.

We downloaded this app and started doing inventory in our kitchen. This app is the solution to all the headaches we were experiencing with our meal planning and shopping. From keeping inventory to making shopping lists to making and planning new meals. We quickly realized that this tool is worth the lifetime plan. We had an issue with our premium features not working. I sent an email to the support team and within minutes the issue was solved. I really would like to see a desktop version.

Looks like it could be a good app except adding everything manually is going to be a royal pain. Half the things I started scanning came up with no data or wrong data. One of the items was cranberry sauce and I had to laugh at the data when it said I had an inflatable airplane lmao. Not sure I want to manually add all the items to set this up.

I would love to subscribe to this app, and it was between this app and another yet this one seemed easier to input items. Except when your inputting an item in manually, it seems cumbersome. also, wish they had a drop down menu for the stores you frequently visit rather than me having to input the store each time and a purchase date. Both those features and an easier way when inputting manually would have me sold on this app.

Okay app, but it absolutely is not free I you actually want it to be useful. All of the useful features are locked until they receive payment, which makes the "free app" advertising false advertising. The recipes are okay, but again, you can't even use the search function without paying 1st which is just downright ridiculous.

I spent an entire afternoon adding things to this app and organizing it, and everything has been re-organized according to the app's algorithms. I now have salad dressings under "Beverages", Goldfish crackers under "Cheese", and pecans under "Sweets". All the categories I paid to add have been removed. What a waste of my time. If you don't care about being able to actually find things in useful categories, this app is interesting, but if you are looking for a kitchen management app, go elsewhere

They must be using AI, because every feature in very dumb. scanned items have pictures of completely different products, the categories are nonsensical, and the recipe suggestions are useless. I didn't have any strawberries, and only canned corn, but all it would suggest for me is various fresh strawberry and corn ON the cob recipes, pretty much ignoring all the other, more appropriate ingredients. Very busted, probably just a data scrapping scam.

Awesome app, but some recommendations: have options for how many days before an ingredient expires before you want a warning; have an option to set ingredients to automatically be added to certain shopping lists and certain food groups (having to move foods back to the food category I want them in after moving the from the shopping cart every time is taxing); add an option to create your own food type categories and food storage area categories. Awesome work so far!

Poorly designed... If a product scan incorrectly, it is a hassle to correct. You gave to scroll through countless products to find the product you have because the magnifying glass does not bring up a search box to search for a certain product so it makes doing a pantry inventory a hassle that should be quicker and easier me. Change that part then I could give it a high rating.

I've just downloaded this app and love it so far! I have Multiple Sclerosis and trying to remember if I have an item or not while I'm shopping will be easier with this. I love the ability to scan things! I have seen several reviews where I think people just need to explore a bit more to fix their issues. Pantry & spices are done, now to the refrigerator. Thank you, developers!

Recipes are hidden behind a $12 pay wall. App will scan barcodes, manage inventory, notify you about expiration dates freely. Uses pre-generated list of 'free' recipes to display whether you have the items or not (tested across 4 accounts on 4 devices and 4 separate inventories). I had neither salmon nor sea scallops and the top recipe for my kitchen was salmon w/sea scallops based on the fact I had butter. It contained no recipes for any of my ingredients whatsoever (not even pbj or spaghetti).

I really don't like this app. First, you can't import recipes to it from the web. Sure, it maintains a link to the recipe you are importing, but if that page moves or the site is not available, then you're out of luck. It won't import from recipe keeper. Next, the ingredient interpretation leaves everything to be desired. A can of diced tomatoes and it'll tell you that you need whole tomatoes. And you can't change it. Pantry sucks to. You can add 14 or 21 ounces of chicken. Not 16 tho.

Thought this app would be something me and my family could use to track our groceries but after using it for a few days it is lacking. We can make a shopping list but when she shares it I can initially.view it but if you close out of the app and try to go back in and view the shopping list the app displays a crash notification and shuts down the app. We can never consistently view each other's kitchen or anything. Sucks because I had high hopes but on to the next app.

It is SO slow, there is sometimes a 10 second lag between tapping a button and it responding. When I'm trying to update my pantry or change quantities, it just messes up. I'll tap the button more than once, thinking it's not working, and then it changes a bunch of times. I don't have time to sit there and fiddle with it to try to get it back to the correct quantity. Hate how much time wasted getting the pantry set up and recipes imported, and now I'm not going to renew unless this gets fixed.

The integration with Walmart and Kroger was the main reason behind the subscription to this software. Walmart integration is absolutely broken. I contacted support. They do not have a plan to fix this issue. Kroger/Dillon's is broken even worse. The stores in my town don't even appear as a selection to connect. Amazon integration is clunky, slow and unreliable.
