after using the free version for a couple of months I moved on to the Pro version and updated my review from 4 to 5 stars. for a few bucks a month, it's a no brainer. the app works very well and syncs seamlessly with my watch during workouts. I track 3 90-minute sessions a week with 32 sets over 8 exercises each session, mainly all with my watch. love the stats and reports as well. haven't found anything major to complain about.

Super simple and straight forward. I just wanted a way to track my workouts like a spreadsheet but needed the spreadsheet to be on steroids, and this is exactly that. I barely found out today that the app also has a way to track not only your weight but measurements of multiple body parts and appendages, like my neck, my back, my... you get the point.. it's super dope. I bought the lifetime membership. 100% worth it cause I can have all of my routines and variations of them stored in there.

The app is really good, makes updating and tracking your progress workout to workout easy. My only complaint is that I wish their was a way to create a routine from your current workout, currently you'd have to remember your weight and rep ranges, plot them all down in the tracker, and save it. would be very convenient to just have an option added to the drop-down menu during your current workout, other than that though Hevy is great.

This app is great. I was using the bodybuilding app and when they updated it last year, it completely ruined it and I was on the hunt for a better app. This app is the best one I've ever used. It tracks your progression, personal bests, best volume, literally anything. It even adds up the total weight lifted and will tell you if you have lifted a truck, dinosaur, yacht, and more. One thing I would love to see in the future is badges or trophies or anything like that.

I switched from Strong to Hevy at the behest of a friend who wanted to see my workouts and it's been a real upgrade! I even upgraded to the paid version when they had an end of year discount and haven't regretted it. I'm a real sucker for data visualization and it's been cool to see myself improving over time in graph form. Have only used it for a few months but so far it's been fantastic!

Really great workout app. A wide selection of exercises even if you don't have that much equipment at home, you can easily find some exercises for every muscle group. I believe the app recently improved supersets workouts. I love the scroll to the next exercise feature, especially useful with supersets,so I don't have to wonder around what is next.

I really like this app. I use the free version for about 30 days before I decided I wanted to upgrade to Pro. I think the free version would be great for someone who only works out at one gym, but I use multiple gems so this allowed me to create different routines for each gym and Unlimited Custom exercises. you have to dig into the settings a little bit to get your rest timer working properly, and just to get things the way you like them to be as far as reading your effort and things like that.

I don't write reviews for anything, except Hevy. It's the only gym tracker I've stuck with. It's easy to use, definitely worth the one time purchase for the additional workouts and custom exercises. My favorite is at the end of a workout seeing exactly how much I've lifted and what that compares to (like a T-Rex!) Thank you for making an app for the gym that isn't bloated or gamified, just gains! ❤️

I'll start by saying I really like this app and recommend it to all my friends and students. But I'm starting to get irked with the lack of integration with Garmin because I can't track my heart rate otherwise. So then I have to have 2 trackers running at once and monitor both. I'm also annoyed that exercises like Kettlebell Swings aren't accounted for in the muscle group breakdown. I feel like that's an easy fix. You give primary and secondary muscles for everything else. Why not these?

Great app. One small problem. I love this app. It makes tracking my workouts super easy and it plays well with my other fitness apps, however, the WearOS version drains my watch so fast. I don't know if it's tracking more than the Fitbit app does, but I can track a whole hour and a half workout with the Fitbit app, and still have enough battery to last the rest of the day, but with this app tracking my workouts, I'll get down to 15% and have to charge again before I go to work.

solid workout tracker. you can use an AI plug in to work out a progression routine. overall just like my old notebook and pen. except much easier to read. for just wanting to track your weights reps and volume can't beat this. I like this app so much I paid for pro Even though the free version is completely functional for all my use cases. keep up the good work!

I absolutely love this app. It's given me a way to keep track of my lifts, build out plans, doesn't constantly ask me for money, and the free version does everything you need it to. Can take notes about my workouts, can add in modifiers, can even make your own excersizes if you know how to import the right files. Wouldn't have the progress I've made so far without it. Easy win dog.

Love it. Setup routines ahead of time. Track reps, weights and sets as you go. Notes are visible right where you want them. The data from the previous workout is right on the screen so you can modify if needed. Rearrange or modify the routine on the fly if a station is not available or a different hit is wanted. Keep changes or discard them after. Very large exercise library as well the ability to add custom exercises. This is the perfect tool to use in the gym and when planning at home.

I've used the free version of this app, for about 4yrs now. It has a large base of exercises and workouts. Options range from Free weights, machine weights, kettlebells, resistance, body weight, and cardio. All options have a "How to" for reference. It allows you to track workout time, Reps, Sets, weight, failure/warmup, supersets, has a section for notes, and you can save/view all prior workouts! I LOVE IT and I would highly recommend!!

I've used a variety of workout tracking apps, and this is the best one I've used. I've been using this app exclusively to track my workouts for over a year now. It's worth paying for the upgrade a you can use to customize and build multiple routines. It keeps track of all of my workouts for every type of exercise and allows me to track the weight, sets, reps, and volume since I began using the app. I really like how customizable and easy it is to adjust my plans.

Had the app for 3 weeks and I'm very impressed with it. It's what I thought I would get with Zepp and the new Fitbit interface, but they failed miserably. Heavy allowed me to build my own routines for each day and then it auto fills your previous weights and reps each exercise so you aren't having to keep a log in a notebook. That allows me to push my limits and get stronger and grow my muscles. Highly recommended!

really love the app and the wide variety of exercises to choose from when creating my workouts. the one thing that would move this to a 5 star would be the ability to have more than three workouts saved. it's not a huge deal but I'd love to be able to see older programs and know what I did so I can modify new programs. aside from that it's a great app

lots of exercises to choose from or create your own. let's you create up to 4 individual workouts for free version. being able to add notes to the exercise, set an automatic timer. and reflect at the end of your workout are great features. If you are new to workouts, use the reflect feature and be honest about your struggles, then come back to them after a few weeks of working out and compare yourself to that former person.

I have been using the Hevy app for over a year to track my progress lifting weights. I find it very helpful with planning routines, selecting equipment and exercises, as well as daily tracking completion. It helps me remember my routines and keeps track of previous accomplishments. The reports and statistic are also useful to evaluate progress.

I'm a week/ 3 workouts into the free version of Hevy. The best part for me so far is the motivation of seeing other people showing up! If they can do it, I can too... it's fairly intuitive, I was able to set up my first weight lifting workout without a problem, and u can log other things like walking, yoga, skiing... I'm very happy so far. editing to add I've made it to 50 workouts and paid for a lifetime subscription! nothing but great things to say about Hevy app

worth trying if you need a free app. will allow up to 4 routines and pro is unlimited. 3 months of data stored for free and unlimited for pro. tbh, simple, intuitive and allows synchronization of health connect and other apps that track health. definitely enjoying the free and most likely will purchase the lifetime option for the pro, but like I said free is pretty awesome too. btw, speaking as a beginner lifter

I really like using this app for my weight focused workouts. It keeps track of all my stats and the little how to videos for each exercise are great for when I need a refresher. The suggestions for similar exercises is also very helpful. I like how the app tells you what your workout volume equates to in a real life object like a helicopter or elephant!

A great tool for the gym. Without Hevy, I was relying on memory to track numbers of sets/reps/weight, and lacking real data for improvements. This app is easy to use and highly motivating for me, being able to track new records for volume or weights. Easy to setup workouts and super simple to track progress as I go. Love it!

Honestly so easy to use and intuitive. I feel excited to get back into lifting as this takes a lot of the mental effort out of it lol. Love looking at the little body map to see what muscle groups I should work next for balance. I would love if you could change the sizes of the widgets, finish workouts without entering sets/reps, and if there were pelvic floor/womens health exercises added as well as niche things like foot strength, finger strength. Overall really great!

an amazing app for workouts. provides visual examples of the workouts for proper form, and allows for some different forms of excercise like failure sets as well as notes so I can remember alterations I did in a previous week. it also connects to my watch and keeps track of my heart rate. sharing my workout with a workout group im in also helps clarify what we are working on that day! its also very good for what is offered for free!

I love this app. The free version has plenty of options for me (just starting out) and its been so helpful with keeping me motivated. I recommend this app to everyone I know who is going to the gym. The only issue I've had is my settings not saving for my workouts. It honestly might be user error since I'm still finding my way around the app. I was able to download and use immediately with the built in workouts and that has been instrumental for me.

Love the Hevy app! It’s super easy to use, tracks your previous weights, and gives you those fun alert medals when you lift your heaviest or hit your longest hike which is super motivating. I also love that I can create workouts for friends and family to follow on their own. Makes training more fun, more social, and way easier to stay consistent. Highly recommend!

First review I've ever written for any app. This app is incredible. Well thought out. Perfect for tracking workout progress. No annoying in-app ads for free version- (which actually makes me more inclined to consider purchasing the "Pro" mode to unlock full features). Glitch-free. Very user friendly. This is exactly the app I was looking for and has become an essential tool in my workout program. Zero cons to this app. Great job to the team at Hevy. Keep up the excellent work.

I use this app to track my workouts on my functional trainer with a barbell. It has access to many different exercises. It's just good to keep track of what you've done, what your personal best is, and just keep track of working out. It's a nice app, very user friendly, and has some videos that show the actual exercise, so that's pretty cool.

I am a beginner weightlifter but knowledgeable of the weights. just haven't weightlifted in a while. I had used a couple of other apps but they were designed more for Sirius bro type weightlifters. when I found Hevy, it provided me with the platform to track my workouts and easily swap out exercises. I'm using the free app and it's truly incredible, but I'm thinking about upgrading in the next month or so. from a technical perspective, no glitches, no issues with the app! Love it

This is the best workout app I've used, and it beats my spreadsheets. I can track my workouts well with it and it gamifies it by giving me a "total weight lifted" for the workout and for the workouts that week. This just makes me feel like a rockstar, and pushes me to work harder. Wrapping up an arm day that lifted 3.5 tons makes me feel like a monster. I'm currently using the free version, and that is working well for me, but will probably go to paid when my next workout program starts.

I've used dozens of fitness apps over the years - and Hevy is far and away the best there is. The interface is very mobile friendly, the access to demo videos is a great feature - but my favorite is the memory that displays your last workout. I cannot imagine even one additional feature they could include to make it better.

Great app for tracking your workouts, don't bother installing the companion app on your watch though because the watch version is straight trash clearly programmed by a 3 year old. Not only that, if you're trying to track your workouts using Samsung Health on your watch the Hevy app forces it to stop tracking randomly because it's (Hevy is) such a piece of junk.

The Hevy app is nice! It is a great app for logging and tracking your workouts. I use the free version and it's good. I would like more options for bodyweight / calisthenics / resistance bands options for tracking. If you have that feeling of needing to report or log workouts to see your progress then definitely give the Hevy app a try.

Really like the app, the tracking and progression monitoring has been game changing. I have recommended it to many ppl. While the exercise library is extensive, its missing some common movements. However, you can add a customs that get added to ur personal library. the cons are minimal but mainly consist around random ui errors, like closing out an edited workout session and only getting half of the option to update or keep appears on screen or a formatting limitations when adding custom img.

Love this app for tracking my workouts. It has everything I need all in one place. Not only can I track my workouts, but I can also send them to others when planning a group workout. The sample workouts are great, as are the animated tutorials for newbies like me. I will definitely recommend this to others.

really great app to track progress and log workouts and measurements. I'm part of a fitness group on FB and already got about 8-10 people to sign up and get the premium subscription too so we can keep track of ourselves and show off our progress to each other. 10/10 would recommend to anyone that goes to the gym.

I love this app. I'm new to the gym and it's really helped me build a consistent routine & track the metrics that matter to me so I can see my progress every time, & adjust sets reps and exercises on the fly. I also value the small animations of each exercise in case I have form questions & the muscle heat map to show what I've worked in each set and over the course of the workout and week. The comparison of my total weight lifted to a heavy object like a truck or a yacht is awesome!! LOVE IT!

this is my go-to app for tracking all of my workouts. It keeps my rest periods consistent and I can implement progressive overload because it always shows how much I lift it the time before. for anyone. just getting started or who is currently a lifter. this is a great app to track your workouts. if only they add a circuit or tabata timer, then we'll be in business.

The app is pretty great, I like how it lets you compare your workouts over time. I wish my optional post workout summary photos would always give me the star chart that measures the muscle groups. 5 stars if you guys could make it a permanent choice. Other than that, the app is pretty great.

Really enjoying Hevy. I’ve completed about 25 workouts and have seen solid strength gains. I like how it suggests weights and reps based on past workouts—it pushes progress without overdoing it. The PR tracking is motivating (volume and max weight). Logging feels smooth, the rest timer keeps me on track, and workout time estimates are accurate. I upgraded to the lifetime version after about two weeks and have been happy with it.

As an advanced lifter doing this solo,meaning no trainer, this app helps tremendously with tracking and organizing my lifts. I love the rest timer aspect to keep me from exceeding my resting periods!!! 10000% recommend if you want to track/log your workouts. bonus : it tells you the total weight you lifted for the day!! fun!!

Genuinely the best workput tracker Ive ever used. The premium is affordable which makes the app better but it is still completely functional for free. Its intuitive, has all the exercise I've needed (if not all the variations it had enough that with notes is still easy to track and modify). It shows your previous best reps and weights for an exercise so its easy to know where to start off. Saving routines is easy and the replace feature allows me to easily adjust the workout on the fly.

Amazing! As a neurodivergent person who feels easily overwhelmed and in constant anxiety of forgetting or missing things this is perfect. Free, with amazing guides and checklists that really make moving so manageable. Than you so much for developing it!
I used this the weeks before and after moving home. Excellent app. I kept losing the paper lists so this was just what I needed. Thank you!

This is an amazing app for keeping track of your move! Easy to use and navigate! The ads do get annoying, but the app is free, so it's not a huge deal. I love having the option to print off a list of everything (that costs, but it's under $3 for a pdf file to print, not bad at all.) This is the perfect app for OCD movers like myself. Keep track of boxes, furniture and more. The one feature I would like to see, is the option to add the weight of each item. But again, a minor thing. 5 stars!

Used it for my move with a total of around 190 boxes. The main useful thing afterwards is obviously the search inventory feature . The major drawback at the time I was using it, is that it doesn't sync to other devices, so you can't just pack parallel with your SO and add stuff at the same time. That almost made me use a different app. Other than that, the app is fairly simple, not many bells and whistles but what it does, it does well. Add a box, fill it with content, label it and move on to the next one.

Useful, but could be better. I love how this app can used to keep a log of your inventory. I also how it has the option to export to pdf (if you pay). However, this app is lacking as a app for packing and moving. It could do better at giving the user the ability to be organized. It would be useful to have an option to mark a box as completely packed, so you know if there's more room in certain boxes without having check them all and so you know if there are boxes left that you didn't tape up yet because there was more room in them. Or maybe even so you can know that you loaded the box up to move in the vehicle. That way you can do an inventory check on the boxes at your new home after moving each load. The option would just help me be more organized. An option I think definitely needs to be added is the option to mark a box as moved, so you can make sure you haven't missed or lost any boxes. The aforementioned option would help with along with this option. Another option I feel would be helpful with organization an extra label for the boxes, so you can label what type of stuff it contains, not just what room it's for or is in. I would be able to mark a box as containing media (cds, dvds, vhs, digital games), electronics, paint supplies, sewing supplies, jewelry, books, dining ware, cooking ware, board games, makeup, misc knick-knacks, etc etc. This, of course, would include the ability to add multiple labels on each box since they may contain more than one type. It would also be great if the same labels were available to manually label each item in the inventory. I create excel sheets for an inventory list when I move. I have an option to label what type of item each possession is, what box the possession is in, if the box has been packed, if the box has been moved, and the value of the item. I even save an extra label for the boxes so I know what type of stuff each box contains. It would be great if I had the ability to do all of this in one app. Especially if I wanted to transfer it all over to an excel sheet to keep as an inventory log.

I wish I could give it lower than a 1. I have been planning my move for over 6 months and packing boxes and just putting the box number on them 6 months later and over 250 Boxes in my storage unit and I open the app and all my data is gone. I can't get any response to the contact emails or anything. I am so mad I even advertised and built up this app on Tik Tok.

Was 4 stars now only 2 I was really happy with this app. Until..... I sat down to print the "markers" (box labels). They aren't evenly spaced on the sheet. I wish the "print"markers" features was designed to be evenly distributed on a US size sheet (or at least have that option). It is pretty much useless as is. I spent 50 bucks on label stock, plus the cost of the upgrade to find out that it prints unevenly spaced on the page, so everything is kind of smooshed in the center. Premade label stock generally has each label positioned in it's column or row equally spaced.so having a 5/16 inch (1cm-ish) gutter between columns, and 3/4 inch (2cm) left and right margins makes the info nearest the center print off the labels and into the white space between the labels ARGH. This is REALLY frustrating.

There doesn't seem to be an easy way to just add items to a box by voice other than by interacting with the cumbersome and slow AI assistant which does nothing except keep telling me "No coins available!". I have no clue what that means. I just want to be able to tell it a box number I am working on and then just voice-add items without a lot of back and forth conversation. This app does not seem to provide that. Per your response, I don't really need or want AI. I just want voice input.

It is a perfect program for someone who is a little ocd like me. I can share it with my husband so he can add the boxes he packs too, and the boxes are numbered according to what's on the system (we chose not to use the labelling system because I have my own system, and the app caters for that). I love the inventory system where you can search for items in boxes. I can set up my own codes per room in the rooms section... and I can set up 2 moves at the same time which is what we doing! LOVE IT!

The app before the update was better and worked quicker. After the update, I had a mini panic after it erased all of my files. However, I had made backups and after entering a title, it let me restore them. The new version runs a little slower than the last one but still seems a good database. It is still better than any of the other house moving apps though there are still traces of random German words scattered around.

This is a super helpful app when you are moving. You can keep an inventory of what items are in each box and which room they will go to. But if you don't want to have that much detail, you don't have to! The search function is very helpful when you are trying to find an item without opening a ton of boxes. This is our second move that we are using this app for and I can't move without it.

Worth getting and worth the couple of upgrades to keep track of your move. We had an international move to do where all boxes need to be inventoried and this app was perfect. Not only can you create lists and organize by room. But the keyword search allows you to quickly find where items are and what boxes they are in. You can also snap photos of the goods in each box and have that ready for your inventory. When you are all done you can export as a PDF and print it off to take with you.

I was looking for a way to export furniture sizes, so I logged a support ticket to see if there was a way. The next minute, there is an email from them saying the app will be updated shortly. I checked and the app has been updated, and the feature I needed is now available. Wow. I am very impressed by the app and the dev team

Absolutely amazing app for organizing a move. The ability to search the inventory makes finding your essentials a snap at the end. I use it just so I have a full inventory for insurance purposes. Weather my things are in boxes or unpacked, I have a complete list of the things in my home. Recommend

A first-class piece of software. During our current move, I was thinking about how to keep track what's in which box without going mad. This app does moving box inventory and room inventory very well, and the search is handy. It's rare that an app fits what I'm looking for so precisely.

A phenomenal, easy to use, and life changing app! I used this app in 2019 for a large move, downsizing from a 2800 sqft home to a 1400 sqft home and separate storage facility. This app made my move feel like a breeze! Having the ability to quickly locate an item from the 100+ boxes I had meticulously packed was seamless! The ability to upload pictures of what was in the box was equally wonderful when sometimes my typed description just wasn't enough. Thanks for this incredible app! Top notch!

Please update to allow pictures of items to be uploaded in bulk from your phones album and the be able to either mass assign them to existing items or create an item for each photo automatically with the option to name each item if you want or give a generic name if chosen. To be honest, the built in camera is slow and cumbersome and you cannot auto link an existing item to a photo already uploaded. These features are critically needed ASAP PLEASE!

As someone who has moved 11 times in the past 20 years many of those diffent states using this app for my most recent move was a total game charger the key is making sure you list every item packed in a box and then label the box with a unique identity that's easy to spot then you will be able to search for that item love this app its great for moving

Tremendous app to plan a relocation. If anyone masters a process it's of course an app from Germany. Even possible to share across phones with your family and all go packing together. Maybe add an intro slider / setup wizzard that asks for already known info in a sequential way, but even configuring via the menues is convenient and works great.

This is the BEST app I've found! Easy to use, easy to add pictures of items and easy to locate a box or an item in any box. It made my move of 618 boxes in storage a LOT easier. I can actually find stuff! It could use some polishing but I highly recommend it. Good job!

I used moving organizer, both free andpro. Both are excellent. It was easy to find something I had accidentally packed away using the search function. I kept track of cubic feet for each item as I packed and was able to estimate accurately for a storage unit. The only caution is that when you start a box, save it immediately, in case you have to switch to another app in the middle of entering data. I love that you can customize package type, e.g., adding bins or backpack as needed. Recommended!

We had a lot of paintings and being able to add a photo of the painting was awesome. Super easy to use and extremely helpful 👍 would be great if it would be able to sort ascending and decending.

It would also be nice to capture more pics.

As someone who has moved 11 times in the past 20 years (many of those to different states), using this app for my most recent move was a total game changer. The key is making sure you list every item packed in a box and then label the box with a unique identifier that's easy to spot. Then you'll be able to search in the app for a specific item when you're unpacking without having to open every box to find it. Way better than doing it old school with a spreadsheet!

The app is precisely what you want: a box inventory solution for moving. It allows you to easily list contents, take pictures, and print and track labels. I like the cloud *backup* feature but would give this a 5-star all day long if it included cloud *sync*. To "sync" between devices, only one can really be in use at any one time - you must backup a move (and box list) on device A, then restore on device B and only use that device to add or modify boxes. For that updated move to be updated on Device A, then, Device B must backup to the cloud and then Device A must restore. It would be far far better if moves would sync. Other than that - precisely what i was looking for.

playStoreReviews.text: App is fast and straight foward to use after master file is imported.  It runs fine on a 7 year old Samsung Tablet/Android 4.1.2.  Ran into an issue when testing on a Samsung Galaxy S10e and paired with a bluetooth scanner that the scans would not read the product UPCs exactly and resulted in mismatches with the master file. Scanned UPCs had an extra digit prepended to the actual UPC.  Narrowed down the issue to the onscreen keyboard interfering with the scans.  Go to General Management -> Language and input -> Physical keyboard (BT Scanner) and toggle Show on-screen keyboard to off.  Would like to request a feature from the devs. Please add an option to reset scanned results to 0.  Right now, we have to manually go down each entry and type in '00' if we want to zero out the inventory.  Would be a great time saver.  Thanks for your work!

App is great. Simple, fast and very reliable with a barcode scanner. The problem is that there is no way to give it storage permission to load product details. I have to manually configure them and it is a pain to do. I think it is a coding bug in the latest version or an incompatibility with my Samsung or Android 13.

We have used this app with success in our small business. I would prefer that there were an option to add a new record if a duplicate barcode is scanned. Currently a duplicate scan will increment the counter by 1. This is a problem if someone, for example, is scanning cartons of up-stock and individual items during the same scan session. I much prefer using an app that will insert a new record for each scan with the option to edit the scanned quantity. Other app I've used incorporates this ability by default and will aggregate the quantities of duplicate barcodes at upload. Because of this reason we will not be using this app in the future. I will certainly reconsider if this functionality is added.

Really like this app. One thing I would like to see is a calculator installed in the app to add or subtract counts. You can use the + and - buttons to increase or decrease one at a time, bot would like to increase or decrease larger amounts at a time. (Example: 100-25 or 100+25, etc.) Still a useful app.

Just downloaded a week ago. Perfect app for running my small Amazon business. So far everything has worked well and was fairly easy to learn and use. Great app....thank you.

I am a plumber and I use this to keep track of what parts I have in my van. While the initial set up isn't exactly easy once it is set up (creating groups, etc.) it becomes pretty useful. It helps me keep track of parts without having to go search through the van. I wish it had a way to copy and paste groups. But that's mostly just a formatting thing that isn't necessary. Will probably continue using this app as long as I see the benefit.

This app is Fantastic . I use it for incoming shipments at the Chrysler Dealership. I scan the barcode take a photo. Then later I can just search for a part number and it will come back with the number and a photo. So now I can find parts for invoices that have came in. Not look for barcodes that are supposed to be there and are not. Can't wait to get to work on Monday and put it to action.

For the price it's exactly what I need and worth the money. It keeps getting better every update. It's not a massive POS replacement, but for small business inventory this is well done. The app scans UPC codes quickly (probably according to your phone's camera abilities). During an 8 hour shift I can use this program with my Motorola phone for most of the day. Not sure if it can print. I just got a WiFi printer and will check it out.

I use this app to keep inventory in our pepper locker. It works beautifully. Took me a little while to tweak it the way I wanted it and to get the Excel columns in the order I wanted them but once that was done its great!! Entered my minimums, took inventory and hit one button to get a list of what I need to pick up. Beats hell out of taking my clipboard and pen and writing everything down. I'm a HAPPY PREPPER!! Thanks.

I use this app to sort my inventory in a video game lol, Warframe. I've been making my own spreadsheets for years now for this purpose but never again. The ease of management is huge. You can search by title, description as well as by any other terms you've entered. The best part is that the search covers all inventory regardless of category. I wish I could hit an arrow that would +/- by 1. It's tedious to go through so many steps when you have a lot to enter, frequently and quickly.

I love how simple and fast this app is. This beats using an excel sheet on a mobile device. My only complaint is this. My inventory doesn't accept negative numbers, or backorder. I sell equipment to customers, but sometimes I sell equipment I don't have in my vehicle and need to reschedule in install the equipment in on a later date. It would be nice to see how many pieces of equipment I don't have. Edit: I found the allow negative setting. 5/5 app!

I love this app. We sell on Ebay and Amazon along with other platforms, and this app is affordable and easy to use. I can't say enough good things about it. It allows us to quickly check in items that are one off and add and delete inventory on the fly. Update. I switched to the online 3 user version since it'll allow all 3 of us to check in items at the same time. I was concerned with not being able to import all the items I'd already entered in the simpler version, but was happy to see a simple export to excel, and import into the Pro online version worked flawlessly. Thanks again for this affordable easy to use app.

I love this app! I've tried several inventory apps to record and organize my very large paint inventory and this one is the best BY FAR! I can quickly add a new color to my collection and even add a pic or two for it. It's also very easy to organize items by groups, which I use to separate into different paint brands. And the search function is fantastic! Makes it very easy to find that one specific color I need, and which brand I have it in. Recommend this app to all my fellow artists!

Crop feature doesn't allow independent x,y axis adjustments. Only has corner locked aspect ratio as if all items are only square. Many items I have are rectangular, which means the image will contain the background, or much of the image will be lost just to avoid the background in the photo. Another idea! Remove the 'Crop' function's mandatory code in order to get a photo!

Fairly easy to use. Does go in depth to the point of creating suppliers of products and tracking invoices numbers. For my needs keeping track of inventory on service vehicle is simple, includes pictures of products and options to import and export from excel or equivalent. Didn't really show how to use app very well and just had to experiment to learn how to use.

I was looking for something easy to use. I needed to have the ability to take photos of porduct for easy recognition. Parts # an change but having the photo helps teach me and my staff the item so we can easy learn. It is easy to setup the items. The only thing I do not like is that if I mess up quantity it doesn't allow just to delete. It forms a document towards a customer. Now I have only been using for a week so I could be missing how to do properly. I highly recommend!

OMG! This is the BEST app. I tried 5 or 6 others and kept having issues. I had a question and they answered right away, too. It took a bit for me to figure out all the setup and configuration and map all the fields to my excel spreadsheet. But woohoo! I bought an adapter (C to USB female) to hook to my hand-held scanner (because it seems faster than my phone barcode scanner). It is now easy-peasy to keep up with inventory. It would be great if it hooked to some type of Point of Sale, but hey -- overall, this is a great app!

I've playing around with three or four of these apps, and I'm pretty sure this is the one I want. In fact I am probably going to go ahead and purchase the full version because I don't think I'm going to find anything significantly better anywhere near this price point. Of course it isn't perfect, I have some gripes about the UI- especially when it comes to entering numbers on the min quantity field, but overall this app is fantastic especially for free

A wonderful app, though I seem to have noticed a couple potential bugs (still trying to see if I'm doing something wrong): I have noticed an extraneous thousandths digit where there should be none (3 digit price setting, no items with three digits in goods) This thousandths digit decrements by 2 if you hide groups. Three digit price is necessary for me in order to account for "3 for $x" deals and rounding errors because of them.

Not sure what happened...I downloaded this app yesterday and got all my pictures and inventory set up. It looked great. Everything was in alphabetical order. Should everything I needed. Opened the app this morning and everything was good. Checked back to update my inventory and everything was gone. The entire item list and photos were there, but inventory was zeroed out on everything... nothing but lost time.

I am using this app to keep track of parts for my school bus maintenance shop. I needed something easier that an excel document that wasn't really updatable. This app has every function that I need. I do not need to paid version but I will probably purchase it anyways partly to help support the upkeep of the app. I am still building my inventory list which can be difficult when items are missing their boxes with barcodes but so far I have been able to either find hem online or make them.

I wish there was a way to reset counts. Whenever I want to do inventory I have to manually set all counts to 0. I tried exporting to Excel, resetting counts to 0 in Excel, and importing again but that also doesn't do anything either. I have too many inputs to switch to another app, so I'm stuck using this one even though it's frustrating. Edit: Support explained how to reset counts. Please upload the guide to your help/FAQ section! Contacting support shouldn't be necessary.

This app has helped me so much. I sell Color Street Nail Strips. I was able to make a category for each style & also a total inventory. I have inventory of my supplies, the cost & manufacturer for the next time I need to order. I can post a picture of the item in the inventory too. I've been using this about 2 months & it's great. I can just look at the app if a customer is looking for an item & quickly tell if I have it. It saves me looking through stock & keeps me organized.

This is a great app for inventory management. I must have installed/uninstalled at least 25 of these inventory apps before I found this one. It's not perfect, there is room for improvement, but it's still extremely useful as it is now. The only two gripes I have about the app is, there is no option for adding Tags for inventory items- I would love the ability to add tags like "blue shirt", or something pertaining to the item to help find & narrow down the item list easier. The other gripe is, I would like to see the option to add Shipping Costs to both, item Paid & Purchase prices. Other than that, it's an almost perfect application for the sole purpose of Inventory Management. This app can only get better from here. Thank you to the developer for providing a simple, user-friendly app to help me keep track of my stock! Fantastic job!

Great for a home-baded business starting out. Wish there was a way to empty contents as a group instead of just individually. Overall it has helped me get organized. Edit: Was able to get awesome technical help for my suggestions. Turns out I need a subscription for pricing and they told me how to move the group. Changing my rating to 5 star from 4. :)

Love It for my business. I sell Paparazzi Jewelry so I have thousands of pieces of jewelry to keep track of. Scanning in items is super easy. You can make categories, add unlimited items (which is hard to find,) add customers, add orders in and out, add pictures it each item, names, details, and so much more. ALL FREEEE! It has Everything I need and I have gotten many other consultants to use this and have a team of thousands of consultants that I plan to promote this to too because I love it so much. You can use the free version with I have for over a year and everything I included above is FREE but you can also purchase to add things like prices and it is very affordable but it is not needed. I bought this add on recently and it is amazing. *I came back to also include I broke my phone 🥵 and like I said I have TONS of inventory and I was so upset after I got my replacement with having to add it all back in again I am on day 3 spending hours each day and just realized I can backup it all up! Such an amazing things and lets just say I have it all backed up now so I can add it to all my devices and if my phone breaks again this will never be a problem again!

I'm a loose leaf tea fanatic and I have a LOT of them. I needed a system to keep track of which types I had, which blends within that type, and how many. This app let me make a group "Black Tea" and then add items. For my use, I used the names of individual teas, and then how many of that blend I have. Highly recommend! It's user friendly and a very efficient and smooth UI.

Fantastic app for any size business, easy to use, stable, and easy to learn as well. My only issue is that I really need it to work on IOS too. If this app worked cross platform, it would be the perfect 5 star answer to all my problems with my inventory management. I hope this is something that is in the works, otherwise I will be forced to seek out an app that is, and I really dont want to! Let me know, and Ill stick it out as long as possible.

Use this app to keep up with my Color Street stock. I like that I can use the barcode or just type the sku number since they don't always have the barcode. the most amazing application of all applications of all applications I've been heard since I began knowing applications. it's very affordable for even small income earners but without bugs and heavy features. I got this app to keep a record of my movie collection, which is getting a little out of hand. It works well enough for that purpose even though it's meant more for a retail situation. I'm using it to inventory my home pantry, freezers, shelving. Keeps me organized and tracks where I put stuff. It's improved a LOT since I first started using it. Wish reporting could be used to tell me what I'm out of, or even be able to build custom reports by choosing fields.

This app is great. I am probably not using it to it's full potential. it is simple to use and does make my life easier when I am keeping track of my inventory. I totally recommend this app to any business owner with inventory to keep track of.

Stock and Inventory Simple! Well, it is simple but it has more features than the title might imply. It's not supposed to have everything for everyone, but it does more than I'd hoped for. Big thumbs up from me. After a few weeks of use I have started using a few of the extra features. If you want to start again just delete all the documents. All items will be at zero but all items will still be in the database, or you can use the stock check option to adjust. ☆☆☆☆☆

So far I am loving this app! Keeps everything so organized. Has so many different options yet its very simple and easy to use. It shows you the growth of your sales and keeps track of your inventory. You could also print reports out as well so you have reference of what's being sold. Couldn't ask for a better or more convenient way to keep track of everything. Beats the old pen and paper!

Exactly what I was looking for. Needed a simple app that can scan barcodes of the items bought during each round of grocery shopping and log it for export to excel so it can be imported into my accounting program. Interface is intuitive, I could figure it out quickly what each menu did. Logging names of new goods is easy but will be tedious. Logging each grocery purchase as a new document is quick with the multiscan feature. Have not tested the export to excel yet, but have high hopes!

I have only installed this app about 8 hours ago and I love it so far although I am finding a few things a little difficult to figure out at first but once you can get everything working properly it is so easy. I think it is just taking the time to learn it all as there are many options. I have only had the chance to put in half my inventory so far but splitting the products into different groups is very helpful. Its very neat and easy to understand, the report list are the best! But i noticed after i updated it today, the barcode scanner seem a little bit difficult to detect the barcode, welp. As a matter of fact, it can't even detect the barcode anymore because i tried like.. 10 minute on the scanner. Anyway overall its the best stock listing apps, thou im using the free version but its still very good to keep you up to date with your stock in easy way.

Excellent! I actually couldn't be happier with this app. I wanted something super simple to catalog and keep track of inventory of the stickers I sell on eBay and this has ticket every box! I use the free version as it does everything I need. No ads too! Honestly, I spent ages looking for something that worked for me and this was it! Thank you!

Super efficient, easy to use. It revolutioned my stock keeping at trading stalls. It includes useful copy functions and a description field for each item where i can put the location (in my case the relevant box at the stall). It also makes it easy then to tally what's left in each box after the event in case of insurance claims. I love it. Strongly recommend it.
loving this app for keeping track of inventory. It is straightforward and easy to use.

free option with no ads. thank you so much lol only using the inventory part to be able to see anywhere anytime what I have. easy to use. love the fact I can attach pictures to each item. helps to locate small things.

First of all, I would like to thank you for providing us with a great product! If I export the database to an Excel file in Stock and Inventory Simple and then import back that file, the images won't load. Could you please investigate this issue? Thank you for your support.

this app is working good and easy to maintain my stock I don't need PC I can do it my phone and get the report

Really easy for me to use to keep track of stock and fabulous support from the team.

Great App with most features free. Occasional crashes but doesn't limit the use for me. Allows me to keep track of my stock levels and the reports help me see monthly totals. I really want the prices add on and to increase the customer limit but I will not subscribe. I would rather pay up front to unlock it - allow this and it's 5 star for me.

Hands down the best stock counting app out there. I have been going to and fro about ten or so different apps and this is the one. Handles xls files, able to scan smoothly functions in a very user friendly manner. The ability to edit while stock taking your items is invaluable.  Also functions as a very useful product database in a retail shop environment.  Only drawback I would say is that because it is reading xls files, it is not as fast as say, some apps which use csv as the database, but it's a huge benefit using xls files as you do not need to mess about with formatting and making sure your product names have the correct format and no special characters etc. Also, the more powerful your phone the less you notice that anyway.  Would highly recommend this as the only stock taking/inventory handling app you require.

This app is a great resource for anyone looking for an inventory app for their store like me. I found it very useful. However, there are some features that can be added such as: 1."Method of sale" Whether it is wholesale or retail. There should be two prices for an item, there is also a retail and wholesale price. 2."Barcode scanner" The item being barcoded must be seen so that the items that have been barcoded can be known. 3."Laptop/PC Version"

Excellent, intuitive, love it Edit: been using it every day for a while, paid for the subscription and I can say money well spent, being able to track the prices of the items as soon as you scan them and getting out a nice list of what left the warehouse and how much did it cost is everything for me.

If you could add 2 function. It would be perfect!!!! 1) enable to sort inventory by tagging Etc - I tagged a few inventory as lighting in few stores. I can sort a list of these inventory just by clicking the lighting tag 2) insert a visible section of the items in which store. It's related to first point above. After I've sorted a list of all the tagged item. I can click into any of the inventory item and see a visible section this item currently stocked in which store.

a very long winded way of stock taking for a food premises. Very difficult to add .2 or .7 of food items and takes an absolute age to add items made in house. I'm sure its great if you want to count stock in a warehouse but in a kitchen, forget about it. Unfortunately you have to download and subscribe to find this out. A fantastic piece of software that has helped me no end. Never had any issues in the 3 years or so of use. First rate keep up the good work.

I love this app, I tried a lot of options but this one it's far more complete than others, you can have your own client database (with all their info) and control their debts and payments and you can control your inventory as you want. I use this at work, to make lists for my boss, it's simple to use and I can export to excel so he can print and make decisions on what to order. It's a fantastic app. I just wish there was an IOS version so I didn't need to use my own personal phone, and could use my work one instead !! 😅

playStoreReviews.text: Excellent, ànd easy to work with. This Invoice Generator is by far the best for creating invoices. Just enter a few key details and it puts it together real fast and nice looking. The best part is it's truly free. I've been using it for about a year now and never had a single problem, haven't paid one penny and it does all the math for you too. (which is just 1 more bonus for me cause math never was my strong suit) Also it makes it super easy to use across devices. PC and Android. This app ROCKS!

I've never made out an invoice before. This was SO EASY and convenient! I'm thrilled with this app! It simplified it. I didn't even sweat or swear! 😆 Easy to itemize, easy to edit and delete, easy all the way around. You can share it by email, or message. You can save it, go back later and change any detail you'd like.

I liked this app - just your bare basics...not bad! BUT - the only thing I disliked was I was unable to delete an itemized entry that I did not want to include in my estimate after all. My choices to correct were CLEAR ALL (and start over) or EDIT (I could zero it out, but the entry remained). Maybe I missed something somewhere because that would seem to be a necessary tool! Also, I liked the many save, open, download, share, and send options. I had a PAID app that hadn't nearly that many...👍

It was easy to use, unless you don't like typing manually. This is the basic model which is free but requires you to do the manual input for each and every invoice because it saves nothing for you. BUT you can choose to upgrade to more features for a fee. If you do sales of different things on very light ratio like a few sales a week, then you will love the basic invoice that cost you $0 to Generate, Share, Download, Email & Print your invoices all for free.

this app is FREE and has made my small business start up so easy and smooth! I feel like many other apps were intimidating and way too expensive. This literally generates a simple invoice. I would definitely say it's great to start off with and definitely in the near future I'm a upgrade to an app that allows me to design the invoice with my actual logo but I do not know what I will do without this particular app! and I also like how they don't bother you with ads to upgrade or pay.Def Recommend

So far I am less than impressed with this app. From what I can tell you cannot simply add an invoice to an email I have to take a picture of it save it to my phone and then upload that picture to my email huge inconvenience along with not being able to edit or delete things that I've added to my list to add to my invoice, a huge oversight and a major inconvenience. I will keep my rating at 1 star until fixed and probably find a different app.

Easy, and does what it says. Fast simple way to invoice immediately from mobile. Send through eMail, done in minutes. Wether service is needed once instantaneously, or on going long term. It's simple and great for starting a spontaneous invoice for a gig or keeping invoices numbered weekly monthly or whatever. Does the math and tax for you too. Including dates due. Simple invoicing can't be any easier or cheaper. No learning curve.

Three years unprofessional. My partner and I started a catering company. We drafted invoices from scratch and we were never truly satisfied with the look and structure of them. Now with Invoice Generator we have a professionally structured invoice. The time to invoice went from 20 mins to about 2! This app allows you to add itemized details and even taxes are calculated. I recommend this app to anyone who operates a small company to keep track of accounts receivable. 5 stars.

I have been using this app for a while, and it's came in handy to write invoices on the fly. I'm a small business person, and being able to use this for free is awesome as well. I would like to be able to save my contacts in the app somewhere, but it might be there, and I haven't seen it or looked for it. The new updated look seems simpler than the last layout also.

This app is one of the most beneficial on my phone. I use this all the time and it's easy to use. The only thing that will make it better is ad a feature that allows you to to save the invoices on the app. I saw them to my cloud drive and on my phone for a short while. I have to clean my memory every few months to keep it from slowing down my phone. It would be nice if there was a way to save it within the app so you don't have to save it to your phone.

perfect for on the fly invoicing. I LOVE this app. and yes, it's totally free. not just free to download. it's free to use. no trial period with a surprise monthly fee. which is why I will continuously give you 5 stars with each update. thank you for your hard work and dedication to provide this app for free to people who just need to type out an invoice on the go.

Love this app. I've used a number of different ones over the years, and this is by far the most straight forward for simple invoices. I appreciate not having to register or pay a fee for use as a very occasional user, and am totally fine with the small professional water mark in the bottom corner in exchange for use of the app! 10/10 recommend. From opening to emailing the invoice, it was all of 2 minute's with no frustrations! Thanks for the great app!

Invoice Generator is excellent for the upwardly mobile entrepreneur. Only thing to add is a storage place for the generated invoices so that it can be recalled in a subsequent period. What it says is what it does. gives you free and I mean free invoice maker. I'm a very small business and I can't afford these invoice programs costing rediculous amounts of money to have.
